title: Preparation of high-performance one-component polysulfide adhesives and modification by silane side chains
abstract: In this work, we introduced moderate amounts of silane side chains restricted the formation of Si–O–Si crosslinked networks in the system, effectively improving the elongation, interfacial interaction and solvent resistance.

title: Introduction to hybrid inorganic–organic polymers
abstract: Saurabh S. Chitnis, Rebekka S. Klausen and Erin M. Leitao introduce the Polymer Chemistry themed collection on hybrid inorganic–organic polymers.

title: Tetraphenylethylene-appended poly(ethylene- alt -maleic anhydride) derivatives: functional group-dependent stimuli-responsive fluorescence
abstract: An effective post-polymerization modification strategy has been developed to endow commercial maleic anhydride copolymer with highly differentiated and functional group-dependent stimuli-responsive aggregation-induced emission activity.

title: Evolution and recent progress of non-spherical chiral micro- and nanoparticles: preparation, design, and advanced applications
abstract: This paper reviews the preparation and application of non-spherical chiral polymer-based particles from the perspective of various technological advancements, while also supplementing the discussion with principles and issues related to chirality.

title: Degradable polyacetals and polyacetal/polycyclooctene Co-polymers from a novel dioxepin
abstract: A novel dioxepin polymerized via ring-opening metathesis polymerization leverages chain growth chemistry to prepare self-amplified degradable polymers.

title: The origin of the thermally stable white-light emission property of POSS-conjugated polymer hybrid films
abstract: We revealed that bulky substituents on POSS and similar emission quantum yields between the POSS ( Φ Donor,film ) and the π-conjugated polymer ( Φ Acceptor,film ) are the key factors for creating hybrid films with thermally stable white-light emission.

title: Synthesis of novel D–π–A-based photosensitive alkoxyamine: application of two-photon polymerization via nitroxide-mediated photopolymerization
abstract: Fabrication of 2D microstructures from a photocurable resin containing a D–π–A-based photosensitive alkoxyamine under a two-photon absorption process and through a surface functionalization step.

title: Molecular dynamics as a tool for unveiling protein-like folding behavior in urethane-based macromolecules: the effect of chain length on the secondary structure of oligourethanes
abstract: Sequence-defined and stereocontrolled polymers represent an emerging class of macromolecules, offering the potential to design protein-like molecular architectures based on abiotic polymer backbones.

title: Tunable adhesion properties of hydrolytically degradable aliphatic polyester triblock/diblock copolymer blends
abstract: Tuning the molecular architecture of block copolymer blends is a powerful strategy to optimize their performance in pressure-sensitive adhesive (PSA) formulations.

title: Innovative synthesis of PPC-P- co -PLA multi-block copolymers via one-pot copolymerization and transesterification catalysed by alkyl boron and diverse Lewis bases
abstract: Semi-crystalline biodegradable PPC-P- co -PLA multi-block copolymers were successfully synthesized via ring-opening copolymerization of propylene oxide, phthalic anhydride, and CO 2 in combination with transesterification of PLA by TEB/Lewis bases.

title: Recent advances in viologen-based polymers and their photocatalytic applications
abstract: In this review, we discuss about the recent developments in viologen-based polymers, which have garnered significant attention in photocatalysis, with promising applications in other areas as well.

title: Binuclear Ni catalyzed ethylene copolymerization with short chain alkenol monomers
abstract: Ethylene copolymerization with short-chain alkenols was achieved using binuclear Ni complexes, affording hydroxy-functionalized polyethylenes with activities up to 592 kg (mol cat h atm) −1 .

title: Synthesis of triamine-functionalized rigid crosslinkers for materials science
abstract: A star-shaped amine-terminated polystyrene of varying molar mass was synthesized on a tens-of-gram scale and used as a trifunctional crosslinker for a classical epoxy resin and a vitrimer, both showing high thermal stability and tunable properties.

title: Thermoresponsive lactate amide acrylic polymers developed from PLA bags
abstract: Development of a mini-library lactate amide-based acrylic monomers from commercial PLA bags. Polymers obtained by controlled polymerization exhibited water solubility adjustable through amide N -substitution combined with low ecotoxicity.

title: Group transfer polymerization by argon droplet flow for continuous and consistent production of well-defined polymers
abstract: Group transfer polymerization (GTP) of methyl methacrylate (MMA) in gas–liquid droplet flow showed consistently lower Đ values of polyMMA than those obtained in fully continuous flow, even with long operation times.

title: Generation of topologically defined linear and cyclic DNA bottle brush polymers via a graft-to approach
abstract: Plasmid-derived DNA bottlebrush polymers with linear and circular topologies are synthesized via aqueous grafting of PEG. These constructs exhibit tunable mechanics, enhanced nuclease resistance, and preserve DNA structure and circularity.

title: Synergistic crosslinking and cage-structured POSS integrated in polyimides: toward ultra-low dielectric constant and high-resolution photolithography
abstract: Enabling ultra-low dielectric constant and high-resolution photolithography in polyimides via synergistic crosslinking and cage-structured POSS.

title: Sub- T g self-healing in glassy hyperbranched polyurethanes governed by mobile peripheral sub-segment units
abstract: New hyperbranched glassy self-healing polyurethanes were prepared. Based on molecular simulations, the mechanism dominating the special self-healing process was revealed.

title: Stereoregular cyclic poly(3-hydroxybutyrate) enabled by catalyst-controlled tacticity and topology
abstract: Metal-based catalysts with large ionic radii and longer and more ionic metal–polymer bonds can control both stereoselectivity of polymerization and chain cyclization leading to stereoregular cyclic P3HB.

title: High performance polyurethanes derived from aromatic acetal-containing polyols enabling closed-loop recycling
abstract: Acetal-containing polyols with high aromatic content were utilized for the preparation of high performance recyclable polyurethanes. These materials were depolymerized using a novel recycling strategy, enabling the recovery of the monomers.

title: Impact of imine bonds on the electronic properties of degradable carotenoid-based conjugated polymers
abstract: Carotenoids are ideal building blocks for degradable π-conjugated polymers due to their intrinsic single-molecule conductance and well-documented degradation pathways.

title: Tuneable and degradable thermosets possessing dynamic aliphatic disulfide bonds via stereoselective thiol–yne polymerisation
abstract: Degradable thermosets with cis / trans -dependent thermomechanical properties developed using nucleophilic thiol–yne addition.

title: Regulating the stereomicrostructure, circularity and functionality of synthetic PHAs
abstract: Synthetic poly(3-hydroxyalkanoate)s are empowered by catalyst-controlled stereomicrostructures, monomer-designed melt-processability and chemical recyclability, and pendant-group-regulated functionalities.

title: Ureate anion-catalyzed ring-opening polymerization (ROP) of CO 2 -derived lactones: rapid catalysis through p K a matching
abstract: Ureate anions rapidly polymerize CO 2 -derived lactones to high molar mass polyesters. A key carboxylic acid impurity from the lactone synthesis inhibits polymerization, highlighting the need for rigorous purification to achieve fast catalysis.

title: Self-assembly of thioether-based diblock copolymers: a comparative study of linear and bottlebrush architectures
abstract: The self-assembly of amphiphilic diblock copolymers into various nanoscale particles can be controlled using linear or bottlebrush segments.

title: 1,4-Oxazepan-7-one trifluoroacetate: a modular monomer precursor for the synthesis of functional and biodegradable poly(amino esters)
abstract: N -Acylated poly(amino esters) (PAEs) synthesized via organocatalytic ring-opening polymerization (ROP) offer potential for tailored, functional and degradable polymers.

title: Stereogenic-at-silicon hybrid conjugated polymers
abstract: Highly stereoregular conjugated polysilanes were synthesized from well-defined diastereomeric building blocks.

title: Novel high molecular weight aliphatic polyamide 3 X based on 1,3-propanediamine: synthesis and side reaction mechanism
abstract: Novel aliphatic polyamides (PA3 X ) based on 1,3-propanediamine were prepared via melt polymerization and solid-state polymerization. PA312 achieved the highest molecular weight ( M n = 26 kg mol −1 , M w = 71 kg mol −1 , and PDI = 2.6).

title: Chemoselective ring-opening copolymerization of δ-lactone derived from CO 2 and butadiene via transesterification to synthesize bifunctional copolyesters
abstract: Chemoselective ring-opening copolymerization of δ-lactone derived from CO 2 and butadiene via transesterification to synthesize bifunctional copolyesters under mild conditions.

title: TBD-catalyzed anionic ring-opening polymerization of hexamethylcyclotrisiloxane: a new route for the controlled synthesis of PDMS
abstract: The controlled anionic ring-opening polymerization of hexamethylcyclotrisiloxane (D 3 ) was optimized for a commercial and easy-to-use organic catalyst, 1,5,7-triazabicyclo[4.4.0]dec-5-ene (TBD), employing various types of initiators.

title: Insights into the bulk kinetics of a 2K radical polymerization system based on the copper catalyzed cleavage of diboranes and its perspectives
abstract: This work explores the potential of a new two-component radical polymerization system with innovative analytical methods such as rheology/IR measurements during bulk polymerization.

title: Synthesis of dendronized polymers through Pd-initiated C1 polymerization of diazoacetates with different generation ester-type dendron groups
abstract: Pd-initiated polymerization of diazoacetates containing an ester-type dendron as an ester substituent proceeded to afford a new type of dendronized C1 polymer.

title: Polyacetals of higher cyclic formals: synthesis, properties and application as polymer electrolytes
abstract: Polymers of higher cyclic formals containing alternating oxymethylene (OM) units and a few oxyethylene (EO) units can be considered as components in solid polymer electrolytes.

title: Polyglyoxylamide hydrogels for the traceless stimulus-mediated release of covalently-immobilized drugs
abstract: Depolymerizable polyglyoxylamides with pendent azides and photocleavable drug linkers were combined with 4-arm PEG-alkyne to obtain hydrogels. Traceless drug release was achieved with light, while depolymerization was accelerated by mild acid.

title: Monochlorination-enabled elevated solar cell performance in region-asymmetric benzothiadiazole-based medium bandgap conjugated copolymers
abstract: Monochlorination led to slightly blue-shifted absorption, deepened E HOMO , weakened aggregation and markedly increased natural dipole moment, contributing to an 22.65% increased PCE up to 9.53%.

title: Dual role of novel highly efficient radical generators for UV/LED-activated polymerization processes
abstract: This study reports novel diphenyliodonium tosylates (IODs) as highly effective photoinitiators for the radical polymerization of (meth)acrylates.

title: Photochemical action plots evidence UV-promoted radical ring-opening polymerisation of cyclic ketene acetals
abstract: Radical ring-opening polymerisation (RROP) of cyclic ketene acetals (CKAs) is probed via photochemical action plots to understand their UV-light promoted acceleration.

title: Structural evolution and reaction pathways in ring-opening polymerization for mono-benzoxazines based on phenol–aniline/cyclohexylamine
abstract: We provide an insight into the molecular structures of products formed in the early stage of ROP for mono-benzoxazines based on phenol–aniline/cyclohexylamine. The ROP pathways are proposed and validated by density functional theory calculations.

title: Dual orthogonal metal-complexes and their utilization for the versatile fabrication of smart interpenetrating polymer networks
abstract: Smart interpenetrating polymer networks are prepared by applying selective complexation. The utilization of orthogonal and heteroleptic binding motifs enables the preparation of heterogenous networks, leading to versatile shape-memory polymers.

title: Bio-based recyclable polydithioacetal covalent adaptable networks with activation-temperature-tunable shape memory properties
abstract: Bio-based dithioacetal covalent adaptable networks with multi-mode recyclability are developed to construct a tunable and reconfigurable shape memory stent.

title: Shedding light on surfactant-free emulsion polymerization
abstract: Photo-surfactant-free emulsion polymerization.

title: Turning down the heat: catalyst-free, low-temperature chemical degradation of thermoplastic polyurethanes
abstract: The straightforward incorporation of labile β-amino ester moieties into the main backbone of industrially relevant thermoplastic polyurethane allows for a catalyst-free synthesis and chemical degradation under mild conditions.

title: Tailoring reactive handles on the surface of nanoparticles for covalent conjugation of biomolecules
abstract: Surface modification of nanoparticles involves numerous types of active molecules such as DNA, antibodies, enzymes or carbohydrates.

title: Polymerization-induced self-assembly nanomaterials based on dynamic covalent bonds
abstract: This review summarizes the recent advances and applications of PISA nanomaterials based on dynamic covalent bonds including disulfide, boronate ester, imine, and [2 + 2] cycloaddition chemistries.

title: 3D printable biopolymers as pelvic floor scaffolds
abstract: Our polyvinyl alcohol feedstock was prepared through carbic anhydride functionalization, UV curing during direct ink writing, and base treatment. The scaffold exhibited mechanical properties similar to pelvic floor tissue.

title: Synthesis and RAFT polymerisation of hydrophobic acrylamide monomers derived from plant oils
abstract: Polymeric materials based on fatty acids have been synthesised using RAFT polymerisation. This work demonstrates the potential of biobased monomers, isolated directly from plant oils, for well-defined polymers to develop more sustainable materials.

title: Commercial organic Lewis-pair catalysts for efficient ring-opening polymerization of 1,2-butylene oxide
abstract: The metal-free Lewis pair catalytic system (Et 3 B and TBPBr) enables to deliver high molecular weight PBO with a narrow polydispersity index and allows precise synthesis of low molecular weight PBO polyols using diols as initiators.

title: Enzymatic synthesis of semi-IPNs within hydrogel-based microfluidics
abstract: Enzymatic polymerisation initiated by redox-responsive HRP captured in PNiPAAm hydrogel microdots (μHDs) in microfluidics. The black network represents the PNiPAAm μHDs carrier and the red parts represent the perfused monomer and formed polymer.

title: Two-dimensional salen-based covalent organic frameworks with highly electronegative groups as separators for high stability lithium–sulfur batteries
abstract: The salen-based Salen-TAPT-COF was prepared and used as a modified separator for boosting the performance of Li–S batteries.

title: Homo(co)polymerization of bio-derived long alkyl chain methacrylate and methyl methacrylate using a readily accessible aminophosphine-based Lewis pair
abstract: The homo- and copolymers of bio-derived lauryl methacrylate (LMA), which has the long alkyl side chain, were synthesized via Lewis pair polymerization with the modified new aminophosphine LB and characterized in detail.

title: Rational design and size regulation of unimolecular nanoparticles for constructing diverse superlattices in soft matter
abstract: This study presents the design and size control of a novel class of macromolecular motifs, known as unimolecular nanoparticles, which self-assemble into a variety of superlattices, including BCC, A15, NaZn 13 , AlB 2 , and Laves C14 structures.

title: Expanding the chemical functionality of levoglucosenone-based monomers for degradable thiol–ene thermosets with high bio-derived content
abstract: Thiol–ene thermosets are prepared from seven different dienes using levoglucosenol as a functional scaffold, affording polymers with a high fraction of bio-based carbon. Tuneable thermal, mechanical and degradation properties are shown.

title: Effective photoinitiating systems using citric acid-derived chromophores as photosensitizers for 3D bio-printing applications
abstract: The growing interest in the use of naturally derived compounds, associated with the increasing focus on green chemistry principles in various fields of chemical technology, is also evident in the development of light-cured resins for 3D printing.

title: Photoresponsive polymers for carbodiimide-fueled transient hydrogels
abstract: Light and fuel responsive polymers were developed. Transient hydrogels could be formed only after exposure to both photochemical and fuel stimuli.

title: Living cascade enyne metathesis polymerization of an allylic acetate monomer and post-polymerization modification via a Tsuji–Trost reaction
abstract: A new approach for post-polymerization modification via a Tsuji–Trost reaction based on the living cascade enyne metathesis polymerization of an allylic acetate-containing monomer.

title: Organocatalyzed photoredox radical cyclopolymerization of methacrylate- and acrylamide-crotonate hybrid monomers
abstract: Visible light-driven organocatalyzed precision radical cyclopolymerization of hybrid dienes yields intriguing polymers with unique cyclic repeating units.

title: Introduction to trends in thermoresponsive polymers: from chemistry to applications
abstract: Theoni K. Georgiou, Richard Hoogenboom and Akihiko Kikuchi introduce the Polymer Chemistry themed collection on trends in thermoresponsive polymers: from chemistry to applications.

title: Synthesis, characterization and efficient catalytic ethylene polymerization reactions of phenylphosphine half-metallocene zirconium complexes
abstract: A series of half-metallocene zirconium complexes with phenylphosphine ligands were synthesized. The catalyst possessed high-temperature stability, outstanding catalytic activity, and excellent comonomer incorporation capabilities.

title: Metal-free multicomponent polymerization to access polythiophenes from elemental sulfur, dialdehydes, and imides
abstract: A metal-free multicomponent polymerization of elemental sulfur, cyclic imides and aromatic dialdehydes was disclosed, which offered a straightforward and sustainable route to access polythiophenes.

title: Polyurethane–urea coatings derived from UV-cured polyurethane–urea acrylate transition coatings for enhanced resistance to chemical warfare agent simulants
abstract: Ultraviolet (UV) cured polyurethane–urea acrylate (PUUA) with hindered urea were prepared to function as a transitional coating. Upon heat treatment, the PUUA network shifts to PUU defensive network with improved resistance.

title: Stereoselective polycondensation of levoglucosenone leading to water-degradable biopolymers
abstract: Highly stereochemically controlled tricomponent polymers were synthesized from levoglucosenone (LGO), a biomass compound derived from cellulose. The obtained polymers showed several properties such as tunable thermostability and water degradability.

title: Synthesis and applications of fused heterocyclic polymers containing naphthoquinone structures
abstract: A series of fused heterocyclic polymers containing a naphthoquinone structure were successfully designed and synthesized. The resulting polymers with excellent properties can be used as chemosensors for detecting Fe 3+ .

title: High second-order nonlinear optical effect achieved by gradually decreased rotational energy barriers
abstract: The second-order nonlinear optical effect was largely enhanced by gradually introducing alkoxy chains, mainly due to the low rotational barriers and moderate isolation effect to facilitate molecular rotations of chromophore moieties.

title: Structure–property correlation of hydrogels obtained via radical polymerization using the central cores of multiarm star polymers as crosslinkers
abstract: A multiarm star polymer can be a useful crosslinker to achieve good mechanical properties of a polymer hydrogel.

title: Transformation of semicrystalline polymer mechanics by cyclic polymers
abstract: Cyclic polymers, lacking chain ends and featuring unique topological constraints, offer distinctive mechanical behaviors.

title: Synthesis and crystallization-driven self-assembly of triblock copolymers based on narrowly distributed α,ω-bifunctionalized conjugated polymers
abstract: α,ω-Bifunctionalized conjugated polymers, synthesized via controlled step-growth polymerization, serve as crystalline blocks in amphiphilic triblock copolymers, expanding the structural diversity available for crystallization-driven self-assembly.

title: Renewable hydroxymethylfurfural epoxide and cyclic anhydride copolymerization: a green route to functional biobased polyesters
abstract: This article presents HMF derived epoxide copolymerization with cyclic anhydrides, adding aldehyde groups into the polyester backbone. Orthogonal post-polymerization modification of poly(CFGE- alt -( exo -NA)) exploits aldehyde and alkene sites.

title: Biocompatible two-dimensional platelets with tunable sizes from polycarbonate-based block copolymers
abstract: Controlled living crystallization driven self-assembly (CDSA) of poly(dimethyltrimethylene carbonate)- b -poly(ethylene glycol) (PDTC- b -PEG) yields uniform two-dimensional (2D) platelets with excellent biocompatibility.

title: Highly efficient synthesis of random isobutylene/alkenyl styrene copolymers with pendant vinyl groups via cationic polymerization for versatile functionalization
abstract: The controlled cationic copolymerizations of isobutylene (IB) with alkenyl styrenes including 4-allylstyrene, p -(3-butenyl)-styrene and p -(5-hexenyl)-styrene were carried out in n -hexane/CH 2 Cl 2 (6/4 v/v) at −80 °C using a t -BuCl/FeCl 3 /iPrOH initiating system.

title: Recyclable iridium-containing copolymers for homogeneous photoredox catalysis
abstract: We present iridium polypyridyl-based-PMMAs that catalyze a broad swath of homogeneous photoredox-mediated transformations, while also enabling recyclable and sustainable catalysis.

title: Synthesis of semi-rigid-biobased polyesters from renewable furanic cyclobutane diacid
abstract: A small library of polyesters was synthesized via melt polycondensation of various aliphatic diols and a furfural-derived cyclobutane diacid. The resulting polymers exhibited good thermal stability and char-forming properties, along with tunable T g .

title: Controlling thiyl radical polymerization via in situ desulfurization
abstract: A strategy that tailors propagating species in situ using trivalent phosphorus enables thiyl radical polymerizations to be controlled by the RAFT agent, thereby facilitating the production of polymers with well-defined architectures.

title: Recent advances in the well-controlled synthesis of poly(vinyl ether)s via cationic polymerization
abstract: In this review, we discuss the recent developments in the cationic polymerization of vinyl ethers to access polymers with well-controlled molecular weights, tacticity or both. A variety of protocols are systematically described.

title: Soft block sulfonated styrene–butadiene–styrene (SBS) triblock copolymer proton exchange membranes
abstract: A new synthetic method that generates a middle block sulfonated SEBS proton exchange membrane through partial hydrogenation of polystyrene- b -polybutadiene- b -polystyrene and a subsequent thiol–ene click reaction and oxidation.

title: Revisiting polymer coatings on nanoparticles: correlation between molecular weight and coating thickness in chain transfer polymerizations
abstract: PMMA and PAN coated silica nanoparticles were synthesized and characterized via chain transfer polymerization. The coating behaviour of both polymers was assessed and indirect characterization methods from the crude reaction mixture explored.

title: Bioderived copolymer alternatives to poly(styrene- co -maleic anhydride) via RAFT-mediated copolymerization
abstract: Poly(styrene- co -maleic anhydride) (SMAnh) is a petroleum-based copolymer that finds utility in both industrial and academic fields. Well-defined bioderived alternatives to SMAnh were synthesized via RAFT-mediated copolymerization.

title: Highly 1,4-selective copolymerization of ethylene and 1,3-butadiene using phenoxy-Imine-ligated titanium complexes: synthesis of metathesis-degradable copolymers containing internal olefins in the main chain for telechelic polyethylene
abstract: A phenoxy-imine-ligated titanium complex—a well-known FI catalyst— promoted highly 1,4-selective copolymerization of ethylene and 1,3-butadiene. The obtained copolymer with internal olefins could be converted into the telechelic PE.

title: Synthesis and degradation of terpolymers of cyclohexene oxide, cyclopentene oxide, and carbon dioxide using organoboron catalysts
abstract: This work presents a series of terpolymers of cyclohexene oxide, cyclopentene oxide, and carbon dioxide, synthesized using organoboron catalysts that exhibit high conversion and selectivity.

title: Synthesis and properties of highly durable poly(fluorene- alt -tetrafluorophenylene) anion-conducting membranes with cyclic ammonium groups
abstract: The alkaline durability of anion exchange membranes is essential for the long-term operation of anion exchange membrane water electrolyzers and fuel cells.

title: Developing conjugated polymers with broad-band absorption covering visible and near-infrared regions for electrochromism
abstract: Utilizing the conjugated backbone structure and ICT mechanisms, several D–A type copolymers based on IDT and SNT, etc. demonstrate ultra-broad absorption spectrum from 350 nm to 1000 nm with high electrochromic performance.

title: Design and synthesis of amphiphilic statistical copolymers forming unimeric micelles with thermoresponsive behaviour in the physiological range
abstract: A crucial aspect of drug development is designing carriers that efficiently solubilise therapeutic agents while ensuring stability, minimising cytotoxicity, and enabling targeted delivery.

title: Glycidyl ethers from acyclic terpenes: a versatile toolbox for multifunctional poly(ethylene glycol)s with modification opportunities
abstract: The synthesis of acyclic terpenyl glycidyl ethers (TGEs) and subsequent copolymerization with ethylene oxide (EO) via anionic ring-opening polymerization (AROP) are described. 1 H NMR in situ kinetics revealed the copolymer microstructures.

title: Modulating the radical polymerization behavior of alkenyl boronates via boronate tuning
abstract: Boronate group engineering controls radical polymerization, enabling precise synthesis of homopolymers and random/alternating copolymers with tailored kinetics and architectures.

title: From industrial by-products to high-value materials: synthesizing sulfur-rich polymers for lithium–sulfur battery cathodes from the C5 fraction and sulfur
abstract: Sulfur-rich polymers synthesized from the C5 fraction via inverse vulcanization exhibit strong thermal stability and electrochemical performance, making them promising candidates for cost-effective lithium–sulfur battery cathodes.

title: Synthesis of water-soluble, highly branched arborescent poly(acrylate)s: a colloid-macromolecule chimera
abstract: Water-soluble branched arborescent polymers exhibit particle-macromolecule duality, transforming from spherical particles in solution to flat quasi-2D structures at interfaces.

title: Association of Zn- and Mg-based chain transfer agents in coordinative chain transfer polymerizations of olefins for enhanced control and activity
authors: 'Ariane Desgranges', 'Ludmilla Verrieux', 'Victor Lancenet', 'Nicolas Baulu', 'François Jean-Baptiste-dit-Dominique', 'Robert Ngo', 'Franck D'Agosto', 'Marie-Eve L. Perrin', 'Christophe Boisson'
abstract: ZnEt 2 is used for the first time as a reversible transfer agent in olefin polymerization with a neodymium metallocene catalyst. Its presence has improved the catalyst's performance for the coordinative chain transfer polymerization of ethylene.

title: A versatile synthetic strategy for non-symmetric isoindigo polymers via modular sidechain engineering
abstract: We introduce a streamlined synthesis of non-symmetric isoindigo-based polymers to enhance specificity and tunability. Structural and mechanical characterization was conducted to elucidate the effects of symmetry-breaking on key material properties.

title: Geometry-directed cyclisation within the transfer-dominated branching radical telomerisation of dimethacrylates
abstract: Transfer-dominated branching radical telomerisation creates highly cyclised polymers at low solids, however, due to its constrained geometry neopentylglycol dimethacrylate forms high molecular weight cyclised structures at high solids.

title: Ring-opening metathesis polymerization of (oxa)norbornenes with sulfonate, sulfone, and sulfoxide sidechains
abstract: Metathesis of (oxa)norbornene monomers with sulfonate, sulfone, or sulfoxide sidechains demonstrate varied behavior from controlled, rapid ROMP to single unit monomer insertion.

title: Designing catechol-poly(ethylene terephthalate) as a depolymerizable adhesive for PET packaging
abstract: 2,3-Dihydroxyterephthalate, a catechol-functionalized derivative of the conventional poly(ethylene terephthalate) monomer, was converted into a reactive monomer that polymerized into polyesters that exhibit adhesive properties.

title: Advanced pH-responsive copolymers for stabilizing lipid nanoparticles and manipulating their internal nanostructures
abstract: Our custom copolymers enable tunable, pH- and concentration-dependent mesophase transitions in LNPs, offering enhanced control for targeted drug release.

title: Dual wavelength photopolymerization of amphiphilic block copolymers via a chalcone-2959-based initiator
abstract: A significant advance photopolymerization: a chalcone-2959-based dual-color initiator facilitates the synthesis of amphiphilic block copolymers that form ordered hydrophilic-hydrophobic layered interfaces upon annealing.

title: Fast and controlled thermoresponse in the photoluminescence of well-designed hydrogels of two separate nanodomains with solvatochromic dyes
abstract: A novel hydrogel exhibiting significant changes in photoluminescence and mechanical properties both in air and water was developed.

title: Synthesis of sterically unhindered Lewis acidic boron-doped π-conjugated polymers
abstract: We report the synthesis of sterically unhindered boron-doped π-conjugated polymers via polymerization of organo-dilithium reagents with boron trichloride.

title: Synthesis and self-assembly of a diblock copolymer consisting of a cyclic olefin copolymer and polycaprolactone
abstract: Cyclic olefin copolymer- block -polycaprolactone was prepared through a metallocene-catalyst mediated selective chain transfer pathway. The resulting diblock copolymer can self-organize into an ordered nanopattern through molecular self-assembly.

title: Regioselective RAFT–HDA: a new approach to synthesize hyperbranched polymers with precise topology control
abstract: A novel methodology that combines RAFT polymerization and HDA reactions enables the synthesis of well-defined hyperbranched polymers with controllable topologies.

title: RGD peptide-mimicking random copolymers synthesized via rapid and controllable NCA polymerization to promote cell adhesion
abstract: RGD-mimicking random copolymers synthesized via rapid and controllable NCA polymerization promote cell adhesion in a manner analogous to RGD peptides.

title: Emission-tunable aggregation-induced emission thermoplastics via ketyl-mediated polymerization-induced emission
abstract: A ketyl-mediated polymerization-induced emission strategy is demonstrated to achieve emission-tunable aggregation-induced emission thermoplastics (polystyrene and polycaprolactone).

title: Increase of spatiotemporal resolution and reproducible layer thicknesses in cationic vat photopolymerization
abstract: Pyridines allow a good control of the cationic photopolymerization of epoxies.

title: Assembly-controlled supramolecular aggregation-induced emission systems based on amphiphilic block polymer hosts
abstract: A series of adjustable amphiphilic block polymer hosts with pillar[5]arene units were precisely designed via controlled radical polymerization. Well-defined supramolecular vesicles and/or micelles were constructed with enhanced optical performance.

title: A catalytic peptide/hemin complex as an artificial enzyme for RAFT polymerization
abstract: Artificial enzymes prepared from short peptides and hemin successfully act as catalysts to initiate RAFT polymerization with good tolerance to sulfur-containing chain transfer agents and temperature changes.

title: Preparation of bimodal polyethylene with different branching densities by a co-anchoring strategy
abstract: Employing a co-anchoring strategy with Ni catalysts, we synthesized bimodal (polar) polyethylene directly from ethylene, achieving tunable molecular weight, branching density, and resultant mechanical, rheological, and barrier properties.

title: Nanoconfined polymerization: advantages of lyotropic liquid crystals as soft templates
abstract: Impact of confinement on kinetics of free radical polymerization, linking geometrical constraints and physiochemical effects to polymerization steps.

title: Enhanced suppression of chain transfer in ethylene (co)polymerization via synergistic axial substituent effects in pyridine-imine Ni( ii ) and Pd( ii ) catalysts
abstract: This work demonstrates that judicious ligand design—balancing steric protection and flexibility—can simultaneously optimize molecular weight, branching control, and MA incorporation in late-transition-metal-catalyzed olefin polymerization.

title: A steric hindrance strategy facilitates direct arylation polymerization for the low-cost synthesis of polymer PBDBT-2F and its application in organic solar cells
abstract: An improved catalytic system for DArP was developed by incorporating DEHA with appropriate steric hindrance and eliminating the diamine ligand, effectively suppressing defects in the polymer while achieving optimal M n , PDI, and aggregation ability.

title: Factors modulating the hydrolysis of Nylon-6,6 by a nylon hydrolase enzyme
abstract: We studied the mechanism of hydrolysis of commercial Nylon-6,6 polymer with a thermostable Nylon hydrolyzing enzyme and identified the substrate characteristics that influence the efficiency and deconstruction product yield.

title: High-performance anthrone-based low-migration photoinitiators for low-power photopolymerization
abstract: Anthrone-based donor-acceptor-donor photoinitiators were synthesized for efficient radical photopolymerization with an iodonium co-initiator.

title: AlEt 3 -catalyzed synthesis of circularly polarized luminescence active aggregation-induced emission helical polyisocyanides
abstract: The simple and highly efficient synthesis of CPL-active AIE helical polyisocyanides has been successfully realized through AlEt 3 -catalyzed asymmetric polymerization and copolymerization of bifunctional AIE chiral aryl isocyanides.

title: Spiropyran-based supramolecular elastomers with tuneable mechanical properties and switchable dielectric permittivity
abstract: Functionalization of poly(dimethylsiloxane- co -3-aminopropylmethylsiloxane) with an epoxy-modified spiropyran using a ZnCl 2 catalyst yields materials with tunable solubility, mechanical and thermal properties, and switchable dielectric permittivity.

title: Optically active helical polymers bearing cinchona alkaloid pendants: an efficient chiral organocatalyst for asymmetric Henry reaction
abstract: Helical polymer poly-1 150 bearing cinchona alkaloid pendants exhibited excellent catalytic activity and stereoselectivity in the asymmetric Henry reaction.

title: Influence of para -substitution on the polymerisation kinetics of 2-phenyl-2-oxazolines
abstract: A series of cationic ring opening polymerisations (CROP) were conducted on a library of electronically diverse para -substituted 2-phenyl-2-oxazolines.

title: Initiation of radical photopolymerization via the long-lived triplet charge-separated state of donor−acceptor thermally activated delayed fluorescence compounds
abstract: The long-lived 3 CS state efficiently initiates radical photopolymerization, overcoming the limitations of conventional photopolymerizations initiated by the 1 LE or 3 LE states.

title: Economical sulfur conversion to polythioamides through multicomponent polymerizations of sulfur, dibromides, and diamines
abstract: An efficient multicomponent polymerization of elemental sulfur, dibromides, and diamines was reported to provide economical access to functional polythioamides with high yields, high refractive indices, and gold extraction efficiency.

title: Fifteen years of Polymer Chemistry
abstract: An editorial from Christine Luscombe and Maria Southall on the celebration of Polymer Chemistry 's 15th anniversary.

title: Reversible addition–fragmentation chain transfer depolymerization of poly(methyl methacrylate) in toluene
abstract: Trithiocarbonates are more effective and have a different initiation mechanism than dithiobenzoates for the RAFT depolymerization of PMMA in toluene.

title: A simple cocatalyst modification approach for tuning polyolefin branching: halogenated MAO in nickel-catalyzed ethylene polymerization
abstract: We found that halogenated MAO is effective for reducing the branching in nickel-catalyzed ethylene polymerization. For halogenation, strongly Lewis-acidic BCl 3 is necessary as a halogen source.

title: Photoinitiated thermoset polymerization through controlled release of metathesis catalysts encapsulated in poly(phthalaldehyde)
authors: 'Oleg Davydovich', 'Josephine Lewis', 'Mikayla Romero', 'Julia Deitz', 'Francesca C'deBaca', 'Jared M. Schwartz', 'Anthony C. Engler', 'Paul A. Kohl', 'Samuel C. Leguizamon', 'Brad H. Jones'
abstract: Frontal polymerization of dicyclopentadiene initiated by UV-degradable catalyst microparticles with excellent resin stability and tenability.

title: Rational decoration of porous organic polymers with silver nanoparticles for strategic reduction of hazardous nitroaryl compounds
abstract: We offer a rational study of simple synthesis of porous organic polymers which impregnate their own reducing sites of Ag + into Ag nanoparticles at the meantime we utilized these nanocomposites for reducing hazardous pollutants.

title: Cation–π interactions in polymer science: from fundamental insights to material applications
abstract: This review focuses on the mechanisms of cation–π interactions in high-performance polymeric materials, highlighting advances in mechanical enhancement, energy storage, adsorption, and responsiveness, with prospects in conductivity and catalysis.

title: Tailoring side chains of dithienophthalimide-based non-halogenated polymer donors to enhance the efficiency of polymer solar cells
abstract: DPI-based non-halogenated polymer donors were successfully developed. Our study demonstrated that tailoring the side chain of donors could optimize crystallinity, aggregation and miscibility for developing high-performance non-halogenated donors.

title: Synthesis of molecularly tunable, dual-reactive poly(4-hydroxystyrene)-based photoresists via anionic polymerization, sequential deprotection, and reprotection reactions
abstract: The quantitatively introduced acetoxy and acetal groups in the controlled polymers can be selectively removed under basic and acidic conditions, respectively, enabling the formation of photoresists with precisely controlled compositions.

title: Aromatic vs . aliphatic linkers: impact on dye loading and stability in oligoglycerol-derived dendronized polymersomes
abstract: We report the synthesis and self-assembly of oligoglycerol-based dendronized polythiourethanes, which consist of an aliphatic or aromatic linker. Using FRET, the effect of the linker was understood and the dye exchange mechanism was unravelled.

title: Large aromatic amide helices via living polycondensation
abstract: We employ a living polymerization strategy and a crescent-shaped monomer to synthesize large aromatic amide helices with cavity sizes exceeding 1 nm.

title: Upcycling of polymer waste to closed-loop recyclable polymers
abstract: This study presents a novel approach aimed at developing the reclamation of waste plastics and the utilization of bio-based resources to develop sustainable and closed-loop recyclable polymers.

title: Biobased oleyl glycidyl ether: copolymerization with ethylene oxide, postmodification, thermal properties, and micellization behavior
abstract: Oleyl glycidyl ether (OlGE) is a hydrophobic monomer from a biobased fatty alcohol. Surprisingly, the in situ copolymerization kinetics of OlGE and ethylene oxide (EO) revealed an almost ideally random copolymerization ( r EO = 1.27, r OlGE = 0.78).

title: Chemically recyclable poly(thioether-thioester)s via ring-opening polymerization of seven-membered thiolactones
abstract: These poly(thioether-thioester)s based on the seven-membered thiolactones paved the pathway towards the development of next-generation chemically recyclable sulfur-containing polymers.

title: 1,2-Dithiolane/yne photopolymerizations to generate high refractive index polymers
abstract: Photoinitiated copolymerization of dithiolanes and alkynes results in copolymers with high refractive indices. Transmission holography performed via this reaction results in stable, high diffraction efficiency gratings with low haze, birefringence.

title: Efficient thick film all-polymer solar cells enabled by incorporating an ester-substituted non-fullerene-based polymer acceptor
abstract: An ester-modified polymer acceptor enhance thickness tolerance in all-polymer solar cells, achieving 14% efficiency at 350 nm and maintaining 80% (400 nm), the highest reported for thick all-PSCs, enabling scalable roll-to-roll production.

title: Self-driving laboratory platform for many-objective self-optimisation of polymer nanoparticle synthesis with cloud-integrated machine learning and orthogonal online analytics
authors: 'Stephen T. Knox', 'Kai E. Wu', 'Nazrul Islam', 'Roisin O'Connell', 'Peter M. Pittaway', 'Kudakwashe E. Chingono', 'John Oyekan', 'George Panoutsos', 'Thomas W. Chamberlain', 'Richard A. Bourne', 'Nicholas J. Warren'
abstract: A self-driving laboratory, combining automated synthesis, characterisation, and cloud-based AI, was developed to optimise the synthesis of polymer nanoparticles by RAFT dispersion polymerisation.

title: Polycondensation of l -lactic acid: a deeper look into solid state polycondensation
abstract: Preformed polylactides with CH-OH and COOH end groups were heated with three different catalysts. Proton-catalyzed esterification favored chain growth, while tin catalysts favored cycle formation.

title: Fast, catalyst-free room temperature production of isocyanate-free polyurethane foams using aromatic thiols
abstract: Aromatic thiols promote rapid self-foaming of isocyanate-free polyurethane formulations at room temperature under catalyst-free conditions.

title: Circular polyester design by gem -heterodisubstitution: valerolactone-based polymers with high ductility and excellent strength
abstract: A series of α,α-heterodisubstituted δ-valerolactones (VL R1,R2 ) provide a desired platform for exploring circular polymer design by focusing on the asymmetric substitution of monomers.

title: Polymer–metal nanocomposites with bi- or tri-metallic compositions exhibiting catalytic properties
abstract: The use of hybrid materials such as polymer–metal nanocomposites (PMNCs) are rapidly gaining attention in heterogeneous catalysis due to their enhanced performance and unique physicochemical properties compared to larger counterparts.

title: NIR photothermal activation in epoxy/thiol polymerization
abstract: Epoxy resins are widely employed due to their mechanical strength, thermal stability etc . A new approach is presented here to activate Epoxy/Thiol systems upon NIR light.

title: High resolution light-based 3D printing of a bio-sourced monomer with tuneable depolymerisation
abstract: Targeted depolymerisation is achieved in micro and macro 3D printed structures by activating an embedded latent base, offering a novel and sustainable (meth)acrylate-free strategy.

title: Modulating the luminescence properties of coronene molecules via inclusion complex formation with helical syndiotactic poly(methyl methacrylate)
abstract: Helical st-PMMA nanocavities encapsulate coronene, forming chiral inclusion aggregates that exhibit red-shifted and enhanced fluorescence emission. C 70 co-encapsulated within the cavity selectively quenches the emission of the confined coronene.

title: Polybenzoxazine-based imine vitrimers for carbon fibre-reinforced composites: paving the way for recyclable high-performance materials
abstract: Polybenzoxazine-based vitrimers with dynamic imine covalent linkages have emerged as a promising class of advanced materials, combining reprocessability and recyclability with the excellent mechanical properties characteristic of thermosets.

title: Synthesis of periodic polyolefins based on anionic alternating copolymerization
abstract: A feasible method for the synthesis of non-polar periodic copolymers with precise periodic arrangements was provided.

title: Gelation-free synthesis of high-molecular-weight hyperbranched aromatic polymers containing silicon by Suzuki–Miyaura polycondensation of tri- or tetra(bromoaryl)silane with arylenediboronate
abstract: The titled polycondensation in the presence of t Bu 3 PPd precatalyst proceeds through intramolecular Pd catalyst transfer on the silyl group and π-face of the bromide, affording silicon-containing hyperbranched aromatic polymers without gelation.

title: Soluble polyimide-based colorless-to-orange–red switching electrochromic film by incorporating a universal joint-like structure
abstract: Polyimides (PIs) exhibit good thermal performance and high stability due to their highly rigid main chain and excellent mechanical properties, making them ideal electrochromic materials.

title: Tuning “ligandless” direct arylation polymerization toward less-branching EDOT polymers
abstract: Direct arylation polymerization conditions can be classified into phosphine-assisted and “ligandless” conditions.

title: Converting high modulus water-based elastomeric core–shell nanoparticle films from viscoelastic to predominantly elastic using di-epoxide crosslinking
abstract: Elastomer-like polymer films deposited from water-dispersed core–shell nanoparticles are changed from dissipative to predominantly elastic by controlling the crosslinking process.

title: [Ru]-Catalyzed olefin metathesis and ethenolysis for the synthesis and recycling of bio-based polycarbonates and polycyanurates
abstract: Eugenol was converted to an unsaturated polycarbonate and polycyanurate. These polymers were then successfully depolymerized and repolymerized via [Ru]-catalyzed ethenolysis, demonstrating a novel approach to the recycling of bio-based polymers.

title: Living ROMP of poly( m , p -phenylenevinylene) and functionalized norbornene-dicarboximides copolymers: guided synthesis toward enhanced optoelectronic and thermal properties with DFT insights
abstract: Functionalized and synthesized Rod–Coil design via ROMP show controlled structures, adjustable band gaps, enhanced conjugation, thermal robustness, and promise for flexible electronics.

title: Towards the synthesis of polythiazolines: a post-polymerization approach
abstract: En route to synthesizing elusive poly(2-alkyl-2-thiazoline)s, the O→S substitution of poly(2-ethyl-2-oxazoline) using Lawesson's reagent yields copolymers with strongly altered physical properties and near-quantitative conversion.

title: Symmetric star poly(substituted glycolide) homopolymers and their surface properties
abstract: We report the synthesis of s-PSG homopolymers, including a four-armed symmetrical poly( l -diisopropyl glycolide) (4s-PLDIPG) and poly( l -diisobutyl glycolide) (4s-PLDIBG).

title: Synthesis of well-defined halogenated styrenic (co)polymers: polymerisation catalyzed by half-titanocenes and their post-modification
abstract: Well-defined halogenated syndiotactic polystyrenes and ethylene/styrene copolymers were prepared by coordination polymerisation of p -trimethylsilylstyrene using half-titanocene catalysts and their post-modification.

title: Long-term humid adhesion of sulfur thermoplastic polymers enabled by thioctic acid-initiated polymerization
abstract: The sulfur thermoplastic polymer prepared by the reaction of sulfur monomer ring-opening polymerization initiated by thioctic acid can achieve long-term humid adhesion.

title: Polymerization-induced self-assembly mediated by vinyl-functionalized macromolecular chain transfer agents: a straightforward approach to prepare cross-linked block copolymer nanoparticles with tunable morphologies
abstract: A series of vinyl-functionalized macromolecular chain transfer agents were synthesized by RAFT solution polymerization and employed in RAFT dispersion polymerization to prepare cross-linked polymer nanoparticles with diverse morphologies.

title: Furfural-derived 5-alkoxy-2(5 H )-furanones as cationically copolymerizable cyclic hemiacetal esters
abstract: Furfural-derived cyclic hemiacetal esters did not undergo cationic homopolymerization, while cationic copolymerization with oxiranes and terpolymerization with vinyl ethers and oxiranes successfully proceeded to yield acidically degradable polymers.

title: Structure–property relationships to direct the dynamic properties of acylsemicarbazide-based materials
authors: Bart W. L. van den Bersselaar
abstract: We demonstrate that tuning both the dissociation rate and the strength and cooperativity of hydrogen bonds by molecular design is important for controlling thermal stability and creep resistance in dynamic covalent materials.

title: Cyclic grafted polymers: synthesis, properties and biomedical applications
abstract: Cyclic grafted polymers, with ring-shaped backbones densely functionalized by side chains, offer unique structures and tunable properties. This review discusses their synthesis, structural features, and potential in biomedical applications.

title: Mechanically robust but dynamic elastomers as functional coatings based on dynamic covalent bonds and multiple noncovalent interactions
abstract: A mechanically robust but dynamic elastomer was designed as a functional coating to achieve enhanced mechanical performance and antimicrobial activity.

title: 3D printing via polymerization-induced microphase separation using acrylate macromonomers instead of macroRAFT agents
abstract: Polymerization-induced microphase separation (PIMS) is a versatile technique for manufacturing nanostructured materials.

title: Ugi five-component polymerization of CO 2 and 5-hydroxymethylfurfural derivatives toward the synthesis of functional polyfurans
abstract: A green and efficient strategy for synthesizing bio-based polyfurans with mechanical properties and nonconventional fluorescence from CO 2 and 5-hydroxymethylfurfural derivatives.

title: Tunable organo-catalysed ring-opening polymerization of ω-dodecalactone macrolactone by the cyclic triphosphazene base
abstract: Here, we demonstrated that the organobase cyclic triphosphazene base (CTPB) can serve as an efficient catalyst for the ROP of DDL. Copolymerization with l -LA and CL was achieved and the copolymer structure was characterized.

title: Synthesis of high MFI polyolefin elastomers using dibenzosuberyl iminopyridyl Ni( ii ) catalysts
abstract: This work represents the first instance of employing Ni( ii ) iminopyridyl catalysts for the production of polyolefin elastomers suitable for high-MFI photovoltaic encapsulant film materials.

title: Rapid and living polymerization of renewable methylene butyrolactones via borane/phosphine Lewis pairs
abstract: This study presents a highly effective organic Lewis pair system, combining tris(pentafluorophenyl)borane (B(C 6 F 5 ) 3 ) with the strong organophosphorus superbase P(NI i Pr)Ph 2 , enabling rapid and living polymerization of renewable methylene butyrolactones.

title: Mechanism and modelling of thermally initiated RAFT step-growth polymerization
abstract: Here we report the modelling of thermally initiated RAFT step-growth polymerization kinetics of maleimide and acrylate monomers with bifunctional RAFT agents bearing tertiary carboxyalkyl-stabilized fragmentable R groups.

title: Conversion of oligo(ethyleneglycol)s into non-toxic highly selective biocompatible poly(ethyleneglycol)s: synthesis, antimicrobial and antibiofilm activity
abstract: This article reports a green and affordable synthetic approach to prepare a library of ten multifunctional antimicrobial poly(ethylene glycol)s and their structure-property relationship.

title: Metal-free near-infrared-induced radical-promoted cationic RAFT polymerization for high penetration photocuring
abstract: A radical promoted cationic reversible addition–fragmentation chain transfer (RAFT) polymerization of various vinyl ethers under NIR light was developed and applied in photocuring.

title: Ruthenium-complex-catalysed de-ammonification polycondensation of aromatic diamines
abstract: The use of RuCl 2 (PPh 3 ) 3 as a catalyst, in combination with 1,4-butynediol, activates the C–N and N–H bonds in aromatic diamines, yielding aromatic polyamines with pyrrolyl end groups and ammonia as a byproduct.

title: The control mechanism of (BisSalen)Al-mediated asymmetric kinetic resolution polymerization of phenethylglycolide
abstract: Chiral (BisSalen)Al complexes have been confirmed as powerful catalysts for perfect asymmetric kinetic resolution polymerization (AKRP) of racemic phenethylglycolide (Pegl).

title: Pd-initiated C1 polymerization of diazoacetates with hydroxy-protected sugar substituents: syntheses of a new type of protected sugar-containing C1 polymer (C1 glycopolymer)
abstract: Diazoacetates with a series of protected sugar units can be polymerized to afford C1 polymers with densely packed protected sugar units.

title: Microneedle-mediated transdermal H 2 S gas therapy for psoriasis
abstract: We report a responsive microneedle-mediated transdermal H 2 S gas therapy for treating psoriasis. This approach employs enzyme-responsive H 2 S donating nanoparticles to achieve a controlled release of H 2 S in psoriatic skin.

title: Hydrophilic and clickable poly(oxa)norbornenes for multivalent lectin binding
abstract: Dicarboximide-based poly(oxanorbornenyl azlactone) and poly(norbornenyl azlactone), differing only in the substitution of an oxygen atom for a carbon atom, were obtained by ring-opening metathesis polymerization (ROMP).

title: Self-healing and anti-oxidative mucus-inspired hydrogel
abstract: Mucus-inspired hydrogels possessing self-healing and anti-oxidative properties were prepared via dynamic phenylboronic ester chemistry between natural mucin and a zwitterionic copolymer.

title: Cationic ring-opening polymerization of 2-oxazolines in γ-butyrolactones using various initiators
abstract: Bio-sourced (γ-alkyl) γ-butyrolactones are found to be valid green solvents for living/controlled cationic ring-opening polymerization of 2-oxazolines using classic and unexploited initiators.

title: Efficient synthesis of polylactide and copolymers under industrial conditions by multinuclear β-ketoimide zinc complexes
abstract: We reported novel multinuclear β-ketoiminate zinc complexes as efficient catalysts for l -lactide polymerization and copolymerization under industrially relevant conditions.

title: pH-responsive polymer-supported pyrene-based fluorescent dyes for CO 2 detection in aqueous environments
authors: 'David A. Londoño de la Cruz', 'David Chappell', 'Bilal Rashid', 'Blaine R. Tookey', 'Calum T. J. Ferguson', 'Rachel K. O'Reilly'
abstract: Detecting fluctuations in carbon dioxide by switching ‘ON’ or ‘OFF’ fluorescence in aqueous environments has often been targeted for efficient monitoring.

title: Rigidity-tuned fluoroaromatic imine vitrimers yield ultra-high-strength, self-healing, and recyclable shape memory polybutadiene rubbers
abstract: Imine crosslinked polybutadiene (PBD) with record-high strength was constructed via the reaction of amino modified PBD with a fluoroaromatic trialdehyde cross-linker, showing excellent reprocessability, shape memory and self-healing ability.

title: Structure–property relationships in bio-based polyhydroxyurethanes
abstract: This study explores polyhydroxyurethanes produced from bio-sourced diamines with cyclic carbonates of diverse structures to evaluate polymer thermal and mechanical properties.

title: Modulating the packing and photovoltaic performance of (bisthiophene)benzene-linked polymer acceptors through simple methylation engineering
abstract: Various methyl-substituted (bisthiophene)benzene linkers are used to construct polymerized small molecule acceptors and regulate packing morphologies, and the dimethylbenzene-containing linker results in the best photovoltaic performance.

title: Fluorescent surface-grafted block copolymer brushes obtained in a versatile post-polymerization approach
abstract: Fabrication of block copolymer brushes via surface-initiated ATRP followed by coupling of dyes and extension of the chains due to preservation of active chain ends is reported. Efficient fluorescence of homogenously distributed dyes is observed.

title: Corona-shaped two-dimensional polyaramid derivatives for poly(ethylene oxide)-based all-solid-state lithium batteries
abstract: Unique corona-shaped two-dimensional polyaramid (2DPA) derivatives were designed and synthesized for poly(ethylene oxide) (PEO)-based solid polymer electrolytes to improve the overall performance of solid-state lithium batteries.

title: Poly(β-hydroxyalkanoate)/polymethacrylate self-assembled architectures by ring-opening polymerization (ROP)/reversible addition–fragmentation chain-transfer (RAFT) polymerization and polymerization-induced self-assembly (PISA)
abstract: Poly(3-hydroxybutyrate)- b -poly(2-hydroxy ethyl methacrylate) block copolymers were prepared and self-assembled by ring-opening polymerization/reversible addition–fragmentation chain-transfer/polymerization-induced self-assembly to afford vesicles.

title: Harnessing enzymes for greener polymerisations: advances in chain and step growth processes
abstract: This review aims to guide polymer chemists in adopting enzymatic catalysis for sustainable polymer synthesis, highlighting enzymes as powerful tools.

title: Trioxanes as photodegradable motifs for additive manufacturing
abstract: We introduce trioxanes as a new motif for on-demand photolysis of 3D printed polymer networks via an orthogonal light source using photoacid generators (PAGs).

title: Developing mechanically robust, self-healable, and antibacterial poly(dimethylsiloxane) elastomers through the introduction of metal-polyphenol networks
abstract: Mechanically robust, self-healable, and antibacterial poly(dimethylsiloxane) (PDMS) elastomers were developed by strategically integrating metal-phenolic networks (MPNs) into PDMS-based polyurea matrices.

title: Monodisperse and size-regulable nanoparticles by polymerization-induced self-assembly for printable colloidal photonic crystals
abstract: The precise preparation of monodisperse and size-regulable nanoparticles by polymerization-induced self-assembly (PISA) facilitates the fabrication of printable colloidal photonic crystals.

title: Triblock architecture and PEG hydrophilic blocks enable efficient thermogelation of poly(2-phenyl-2-oxazine)-based worm-gels
abstract: Copolymers of 2-methyl-2-oxazoline and 2-phenyl-2-oxazine-based copolymers with different architectures and a triblock copolymer of polyethylene glycol and poly(2-phenyl-2-oxazine) are introduced and assessed regarding their thermogelation.

title: An alkylthio side chain tuned the PM6 structure and elevated photovoltaic performance of ternary donor polymers
abstract: A series of ternary conjugated donor polymers were developed and achieved power conversion efficiency (PCE) of up to 16.46% when matched with Y6.

title: Correlating chlorinated polyethylene molecular structure to compatibilization efficiency for mixed polymer waste
abstract: Comparing blocky versus gradient chlorinated polyethylene compatibilizer performance for polyolefin elastomer/polyvinyl chloride blends. The effects of crystallinity and sequence distribution on compatibilizer performance.

title: Synthesis, structure control and functions of polymers containing conjugated transition metal complex moieties
abstract: Polymers containing conjugated metal complex moieties in the main/side chains are high-performance materials that combine the catalytic and photoelectric functions of metal complexes with the photoelectric properties of π-conjugated polymers.

title: Synthesis of fluorinated phenylene-alkoxybenzothiadiazole polymer (PDTBTBz-2F anti ) by DHAP
abstract: A new synthesis of PDTBTBz-2F anti was developed via DHAP using a partially biobased monomer. Two pathways were compared by DFT, experiments and OSC tests, benchmarked to Stille coupling, and preliminarily adapted to continuous-flow.

title: Facile synthesis of functionalized high vinyl polybutadiene by using 1,2-dipiperidinoethane derivatives as polar modifiers
abstract: Polydiene-based liquid rubber can be used to prepare high-frequency copper-clad plates, and it is also the most critical raw material for photosensitive elastomers used in flexible resin plates.

title: Constructing pH-responsive poly(trimethylene carbonate) (PTMC)-based polymersomes functionalized with cell-penetrating guanidines
abstract: The functionalization of pH-responsive polymersome surfaces with guanidine groups can significantly improve the internalization of nanoparticles, thereby increasing killing of cancer cells.

title: Iron-initiated radical polymerization of acrylate monomers
abstract: Fe–H initiated radical polymerization of acrylates with Fe(acac) 3 and tetramethyldisiloxane under mild conditions yields polymers with molecular weights up to 700 kg mol −1 and 20–50% conversion, showing strong viscoelastic properties.

title: Cyclobutane-linked nanothreads through thermal and photochemically mediated polymerization of cyclohexadiene
abstract: We present the pressure-induced polymerization of 1,4-cyclohexadiene, wherein thermal methods may access multiple reaction pathways. In contrast, light enables solely cyclobutane-based nanothreads to arise from a single viable reaction pathway.

title: Adhesive-tuning with aromatic dithiols in thiol-quinone Michael polyadditions to tailor thiol-catechol connected (TCC) polymers
abstract: Thiophenolic dithiols enabled rapid, selective thiol-quinone polyaddition, forming thiol-catechol connected (TCC) polymers with strong dry and underwater adhesion driven by high glass transition temperatures and intrinsic hydrophobicity.

title: Materials designed to degrade: structure, properties, processing, and performance relationships in polyhydroxyalkanoate biopolymers
abstract: A materials tetrahedron framework is applied to PHA biopolymers to highlight design challenges and frame potential future research exploring structure, property, processing, and performance relationships.

title: Tailoring tetracationic linkers to improve the physical and CO 2 gas separation properties of doubly segmented PEEK-ionene + ionic liquid composites
abstract: Integrating the features of PEEK with imidazolium ionenes and ionic liquids provides a unique and vast platform for designing new polymeric gas separation membranes with tunable properties for capturing CO 2 from gas streams.

title: “One-stop” polymer circularly polarized luminescence platform: easy construction of full-color circularly polarized luminescent materials
abstract: Fluorescent groups with hydroxyl groups can be introduced into polyisocyanide copolymers by simple transesterification to prepare multicoloured CPL materials.

title: Preparation and nanoaggregate formation ability in water of amphiphilic ladder-like polymers with parallelly linked hydrophilic polyether and hydrophobic polysiloxane chains
abstract: An amphiphilic ladder-like polymer (PGE–PAMS) was successfully prepared. PGE–PAMS formed nanoaggregates in water, which were stable even at high temperatures.

title: Block copolymers from coordinative chain transfer (co)polymerization (CCT(co)P) of olefins and 1,3-dienes and mechanical properties of the resulting thermoplastic elastomers
abstract: Controlled coordination polymerization of olefins and 1,3-dienes enables macromolecular engineering and, in particular, the design of new thermoplastic elastomers with high mechanical properties.

title: Bio-based poly(1,3-trimethyleneglycol- co -lactide) triblock copolymers: a promising platform for biomedical applications
abstract: Bio-based PLA- b -PO 3 G n - b -PLA copolymers were synthesized via ROP of L-/rac-lactide using PO 3 G n macroinitiators. Their chemical structure, thermal behaviour, and nanoparticle self-assembly into nanoparticles were thoroughly studied.

title: Cationic porous organic polymers for selective adsorption in gas and liquid phases
abstract: Two cationic porous organic polymer materials (CTN-POPs) were prepared via the Zincke reaction. CTN-POPs exhibited selective adsorption capabilities for carbon dioxide, dyes, and drugs in both gas and liquid phases.

title: Nickel-catalyzed reductive cross-coupling polymerization of dithiosulfonates and dibromides for the synthesis of polythioethers
abstract: We disclose a novel thiolation polymerization using dithiosulfonate as a surrogate thiolation reagent, which was applied with aliphatic dibromide in a nickel catalyzed reductive cross-coupling polymerization for the synthesis of polythioethers.

title: Improved thermal properties of polydimethylsiloxane by copolymerization and thiol–ene crosslinking of 2-pyrone-4,6-dicarboxylic acid moiety
abstract: Thermally stable copolymers of 2-pyrone-4,6-dicarboxylic acid (PDC), a metabolic intermediate of lignin, and polydimethylsiloxane were synthesized and cross-linked by using thiol–ene click chemistry.

title: Ultrahigh-resolution, high interface contrast ionic homopolymers induced by acid–base mixed electrostatic interactions and nanopattern evolution
abstract: Homopolymers based on polystyrene sulfonate imidazolium salts can achieve efficient self-assembly under solvent-free conditions, obtaining sub-3 nm hexagonally packed cylinders and sub-4 nm lamellar nanopatterns with high interface contrast.

title: Rare earth–transition metal cooperativity in the ring-opening polymerisation of tetrahydrofuran
abstract: A synergistic RECl 3 /[Cu(CH 3 CN) 4 ]PF 6 catalyst system enables the controlled, ring-opening polymerisation of THF at room temperature without the need of any additional initiators via heterobimetallic cooperativity.

title: Poly(bridged bicycle)s synthesized via cyclopolymerization of cyclic diacrylates
abstract: Cyclic diacrylate monomer prepared via reversible conjugate substitution reaction underwent cyclopolymerization to afford poly(bridged bicycle)s with high glass transition temperature.

title: π-Conjugated polymers consisting of heavier group 13 elements
abstract: π-Conjugated polymers containing heavier group 13 elements are emerging materials applicable to optoelectronic devices and inorganic synthesis. This review presents an overview of synthesis and optical properties of these polymers.

title: Porphyrin derivatives: promising perspectives in visible/IR light photopolymerization
abstract: Development of porphyrin derivatives as new photoinitiating systems for visible/IR photopolymerization.

title: Exploring transamidation and chemical recycling of β-amino amide-derived covalent adaptable networks
abstract: This study explores a newly identified transamidation exchange in the β-amino amide dynamic covalent chemistry and the chemical recycling of β-amino amide-derived covalent adaptable networks.

title: Covalent design of ionogels: bridging with hydrogels and covalent adaptable networks
abstract: Ionogels with novel properties draw inspiration from the outstanding covalent designs of hydrogels and covalent adaptable networks.

title: Online GPC monitoring for batch and flow polymerisation reactions
abstract: Gel Permeation Chromatography (GPC) is well established as the gold standard for routine molecular weight analysis of polymers giving both mass and mass dispersity information.

title: Polynorbornene with silicon cluster pendant groups
abstract: Ring-opening metathesis polymerization (ROMP) on a norbornene-terminated Si[2.2.2] oligosilane enables access to the first polymers with multicyclic silicon cluster pendant groups. These are materials of interest for ultrathin dielectrics.

title: Solvent and temperature effects in the photoiniferter RAFT polymerisation of PEG methacrylate
abstract: Photoiniferter (PI)-RAFT polymerisation is a promising approach to synthesise a broad range of polymers due to its' "living" nature. We have investigated the effect of illumination, solvent and temperature on the PI-RAFT polymerisation of PEGMA.

title: Choice of photo-excitation conditions in xanthate-supported photo-iniferter (XPI) RAFT polymerization
abstract: The influence of irradiation conditions on the livingness in xanthate supported photo-iniferter RAFT polymerization is investigated. Multiblock and diblock systems are used to assess chain extension in batch and flow.

title: Self-toughened hydrocarbon copolymers with low dielectric constant and dielectric loss
abstract: Vinyl-containing hydrocarbon copolymers with self-toughening properties were synthesized by atom transfer radical polymerization (ATRP) reaction, and showed excellent dielectric properties and high thermal resistance.

title: Immunostimulatory pH-responsive nanogels derived from poly(oxanorbornene) precursor polymers
abstract: Living Ring-opening methathesis block copolymerization of oxanorbornenes provides access to pH-degradable nanogels with covalently linked TLR 7/8 agonists, showing selective uptake and immunostimulation of macrophages only for the intact nanogels.

title: Synthesis of butadiene-derived polyolefin graft copolymers and their crystallization behaviors
abstract: This work reports the synthesis of semicrystalline polyolefin-based graft copolymers and understanding their crystallization behaviors and blend compatibilization performance for potentially addressing mixed polyethylene and polypropylene.

title: A dual-initiating organic frustrated Lewis pair catalyst for living polymerizations of (bio)acrylates to facilitate the synthesis of metal-free multiblock copolymers
abstract: This article reports the first organic dual-initiating FLP catalyst based on borane and commercially available bisphosphine for living polymerizations of (bio)acrylates to facilitate the synthesis of metal-free multiblock copolymers.

title: Transparent diblock copolymer nanoparticle dispersions via efficient RAFT emulsion polymerisation in ionic liquid
abstract: The first RAFT emulsion polymerisation formulation in ionic liquid yields transparent diblock copolymer nanoparticle dispersions with improved efficiency and control.

title: A new recyclable polymer based on Diels–Alder crosslinking networks derived from anisaldehyde
abstract: The preparation of recyclable cross-linked polymers by combining biomass-based resources with dynamic covalent bonds is a promising strategy for the preparation of sustainable and recyclable thermosetting materials.

title: Pulsed laser polymerization to retrieve kinetic parameters for a propagated mid-chain radical in poly( n -butyl acrylate) synthesis: a combined DFT and kinetic Monte Carlo study
authors: 'F. A. Lugo', 'L. Trossaert', 'Y. W. Marien', 'M. K. Sabbe', 'M. Edeleva', 'D. R. D'hooge', 'P. H. M. Van Steenberge'
abstract: Roadmap to obtain acrylate-specific rate coefficients/Arrhenius parametersrr via PLP-SEC.

title: The base-free multicomponent polymerization of elemental sulfur, difluoromethylene phosphobetaine and amines toward electron-deficient aromatic polythioureas
abstract: Catalyst-free multicomponent polymerizations of sulfur, difluoromethylene phosphobetaine (PDFA), and amines were designed and developed to efficiently synthesize various polythioureas, including electron-deficient aromatic polythioureas.

title: The livingness of poly(methyl acrylate) under visible light photoiniferter-RAFT polymerization mediated by trithiocarbonates
abstract: In this work, we highlight the impact of reaction conditions ( i.e. monomer conversion, reaction time, and light intensity) on the stability of thiocarbonylthio group-containing polymers by quantification utilizing TG-HPLC.

title: Non-toxic degradation of anhydride-cured epoxy thermoset using a deep eutectic solvent
abstract: Deep eutectic solvent is proposed for transesterification-based degradation, enabling carbon fiber extraction from epoxy composites and partial catalyst recovery.

title: Basic concepts and tools of artificial intelligence in polymer science
abstract: AI-driven polymer science: a structured perspective on integrating machine learning for data analysis, property prediction, and automated research workflows.

title: Troponoid-mediated radical polymerization in aqueous medium
abstract: Troponoid-mediated radical polymerization has been conducted in aqueous solutions with RDRP characteristics. This technique offers an environmentally friendly approach for synthesizing advanced block copolymers.

title: Mechanochemical activation of an indole-fused 2 H -benzopyran generates an acidochromic merocyanine dye enabling multicolor chromomorphic materials
abstract: Mechanochemical activation of an indole-fused 2 H -1-benzopyran mechanophore generates a yellow-colored merocyanine dye in polymers that is subsequently transformed to a purple-colored dye upon treatment with acid.

title: High strength and rapid self-healing daidzein-based polyhydroxyurethanes for high temperature-resistant adhesives
abstract: Polyhydroxyurethanes (PHUs) are considered a sustainable and safer alternative to traditional toxic isocyanate-based polyurethanes (PUs).

title: Expanding the polymerization potential of itaconic acid through methacrylate functionalization
abstract: Tailorable and well-defined itaconic acid based polymers.

title: Photocontrolled cationic polymerization of fluorinated vinyl ethers
abstract: Visible light-regulated photocontrolled cationic RAFT polymerization has been successfully developed for the synthesis of fluorinated polymers.

title: Reactive oxygen species-sensitive thioether-bearing poly(2-oxazoline)s: direct and controlled polymerization using an initiator salt
abstract: A direct, functional monomer-based route for ROS sensitive poly(2-oxazoline)s is presented. Oxidation and hydrophilic-to-hydrophobic switching were successfully conducted for the resulting homo- and block copolymers.

title: Tailoring polyester-based diblock copolymers for boron-enhanced drug delivery: synthesis, kinetics, and nanoparticle characterization
abstract: Precise polymer structure: Functionalized gradient diblock copolymers self-assemble into nanoparticles, facilitating drug encapsulation through reversible interactions between copolymer diols and the phenylboronic acid of a metalolacarborane-based model drug.

title: An eco-friendly adhesive with ultra-strong adhesive performance
abstract: A closed-loop recyclable, bio-based, solvent-free adhesive (CBA) with excellent bonding performance is developed.

title: Poly(propene- co -norbornene)s with high molar masses and tunable norbornene contents and properties, obtained in high yields using ketimide-modified half-titanocene catalysts
abstract: The ketimide half-titanocene catalysts 1–3 yielded high molar mass propene-norbornene copolymers (P- co -N) with efficient N incorporation and tensile properties ranging from ductile and tough materials to stiff and fragile ones as N content increases.

title: A potential biobased thermoplastic elastomer based on β-myrcene via RAFT-mediated miniemulsion polymerization
abstract: This work presents the synthesis of a bio-based reprocessable, environmentally-friendly ABA-type thermoplastic elastomer using isobornyl methacrylate and β-Myrcene.

title: Tuning the linkage microenvironment in imine-based covalent organic frameworks for enhanced photocatalytic hydrogen production
abstract: Rational design of covalent organic frameworks (COFs) at the molecular level is necessary to improve their photocatalytic hydrogen evolution (PHE) performance.

title: Thermoplastic polyurethane/silicone rubber (TPU/SiR) thermoplastic elastomers with fine phase structures and comfortable textures based on polymerization-induced phase separation
abstract: Silicone based TPEs were prepared via polymerization-induced phase separation without using compatibilizers, and these TPEs exhibited tunable phase morphology and performance and comfortable biological tactile performance.

title: Mussel-inspired PAM–PDA/Ga 3+ hydrogels with antibacterial, adhesive and self-healable properties for wearable strain sensors
abstract: An integrated multifunctional polyacrylamide–polydopamine/gallium( iii ) (PAM–PDA/Ga 3+ ) hydrogel with antibacterial, adhesive, and self-healing capabilities has been developed for wearable strain sensors.

title: Supramolecular polymerization and self-assembly of transition metal complexes
abstract: Metallo-supramolecular polymers (MSPs) combine metal–ligand coordination and non-covalent interactions. This review highlights how ligand geometry and metal choice influence MSP design for emerging applications.

title: Revisiting AB 2 + A-R copolymerization: direct access to Janus and peripherally clickable hyperbranched polyesters
abstract: Direct AB 2 + A-R-type melt transesterification polymerization yielded Janus and peripherally clickable hyperbranched polyesters; when terminally unsaturated alkanols were used as A-R, it could be transformed to amphiphilic core shell HB structures.

title: Aziridine-based organocatalytic polymerization for tunable sulfur incorporation in polyureas
abstract: Organocatalytic polymerization of aziridine, isocyanate, and inorganic sulfur enables the synthesis of oligosulfide-functionalized polyureas and poly(thioether urea)s with adjustable sulfur content.

title: Cyclic thioacetal carbonates for dual-stimuli degradable poly(vinyl ether)s with cleavable thioacetal and carbonate bonds evenly distributed in the main chains by cationic degenerative chain-transfer copolymerization
