abstract: Dual-degradable poly(vinyl ether)s were prepared by cationic degenerative chain-transfer copolymerization of macrocyclic thioacetal carbonate and vinyl ether and degraded to low- and controlled-molecular-weight products by acid and base catalysts.

title: Poly(ε- l -lysine)-decorated particles with a tunable morphology by a combination of Ugi multicomponent polymerisation and RAFT-mediated PISA
abstract: We report herein the unprecedented combination of the Ugi multicomponent reaction (Ugi MCR) and Polymerisation-Induced Self-Assembly (PISA) to fabricate poly(ε- l -lysine) (PεLL) decorated amphiphilic nanoparticles.

title: Synthesis and cell-induced luminescence of post-functionalisable ionisable polyesters from the Passerini 3-component polymerisation
authors: 'Lewis O'Shaughnessy', 'Akosua Anane-Adjei', 'Mariarosa Mazza', 'Naoto Hori', 'Pratik Gurnani', 'Cameron Alexander'
abstract: A high-yielding multicomponent reaction has been applied to synthesise a new polymer family displaying luminescence exclusively on incubation with cells.

title: Preparation and performance evaluation of rare earth metal Eu( iii )-mediated docosahexaenoic acid-imprinted microspheres
abstract: Recognition mechanism diagram of imprinted polymer microspheres mediated by rare earth metal Eu( iii ).

title: Multifunctionalization of polybutadiene by RAFT/MADIX technology
abstract: A new strategy for the multi-functionalization of polybutadiene has been developed using reversible addition–fragmentation chain transfer polymerization/macromolecular design by interchange of xanthates (RAFT/MADIX) technology.

title: Photothermally-driven cobalt catalysed atom transfer radical polymerisation enables isocyanide copolymer synthesis
abstract: A vitamin B 12 -derived photothermal catalyst enables controlled isocyanide copolymerization, synthesis of block copolymers, and temporal control via ATRP, while outperforming conventional systems under white light irradiation.

title: Microfluidic-supported emulsion polymerization: molecular weight and concentration of surface-capping agents impact the formation of anisotropic polyvinylmethacrylate particles
abstract: Surface-capping agents—for example, amphiphilic surfactant molecules, water-soluble polymers, or polyelectrolytes—play a critical role during polymerization reactions for both the formation and stability of colloidal polymer particles.

title: Synthesis and molecular dynamics simulation of photo-thermal responsive liquid crystal shape memory polymers with dynamic diselenide bonds
abstract: A novel class of photo-thermal responsive shape memory polymers with dynamic selenium bonds and kinetic simulation.

title: Redox-responsive micellar nanoparticles using benzothiazole-disulfide terminated polymers: employing host–guest complexation for targeted delivery of curcumin
abstract: A modular approach to install functional chain-end groups through a redox-responsive disulfide linkage is utilized to fabricate a targeted delivery system using self-assembly.

title: A multifaceted poly(ionic liquid)-based superabsorbent hydrogel for simultaneous removal of heavy metals and synthetic dyes
abstract: The synthesized poly(cationic- co -anionic) based hydrogels are very effective in simultaneous removal of dyes (both cationic and anionic dyes) and heavy metals from an aqueous medium.

title: Biobased triblock thermoplastic elastomer with betulin- or carvacryl-methacrylate end-blocks by RAFT polymerization
abstract: Fully biobased thermoplastic elastomers (TPEs) via RAFT polymerization with terpenoid methacrylates glassy blocks. Demonstrating the efficacy in producing high-performance, sustainable TPEs offering a viable alternative to conventional TPE materials.

title: Smart polymers for 3D printing applications: current status and future outlook
abstract: This review highlights the integration of smart, stimuli-responsive polymers with 3D printing to enable advanced applications. It discusses material design, printing strategies, and emerging opportunities for adaptive, multifunctional systems.

title: Mechanism and modelling of photo-mediated RAFT step-growth polymerization
abstract: Here, we report the modelling of photo-mediated RAFT step-growth polymerization kinetics of maleimide and acrylate monomers with bifunctional RAFT agents bearing tertiary carboxyalkyl stabilized fragementable R groups.

title: Stable self-assemblies of polyhydroxybutyrate-based diblock and triblock copolymers nanoprecipitated in water: influence of their hydrophilic weight fraction
abstract: Polyester-based amphiphilic block copolymers self-assembled in buffer give access to very stable micelles.

title: Ring-opening polymerization of six-membered 1,3-dioxa-2-silacycloalkanes by an organobase catalyst: precision polymerization and monomer regeneration by polymer degradation
abstract: Six-membered 1,3-dioxa-2-silacycloalkanes were demonstrated to undergo ring-opening polymerization and subsequent monomer regeneration via polymer degradation.

title: Isomeric orientation of the S atom in thiophene of benzodithiophene-4,8-dione to achieve a high-performance electrochromic polymer
abstract: The importance of the isomeric orientation of a thiophene ring and conjugation length in tuning the electrochromic performance of polymers, offering a promising approach for designing high-performance electrochromic materials.

title: Bimetallic aluminum complexes bearing β-pyridyl-enamino ligands: synthesis, characterization and their applications in the ring-opening polymerization of ε-caprolactone
abstract: Bimetallic aluminum complexes bearing β-pyridyl-enamino ligands were designed and synthesized. Efficient ring-opening polymerization of ε-CL was achieved by regulating the Al–Al distance and alkyl groups.

title: Facile synthesis and properties of thioamide-containing polymers
abstract: A facile and efficient strategy to prepare thioamide-containing polymers in a controlled fashion is developed. The thionation could endow polymers with more pronounced metal-ion-dependent solution behavior and stronger Au/Ag/Hg-coordinating capacity.

title: FDCA bio-based copolyester PBFA: synthesis, properties, and fluorescence regulation
abstract: Bio-based PBFA copolyesters were synthesized with excellent thermal and mechanical properties. The material exhibits tunable photoluminescence, making it promising for sustainable engineering plastics and optical applications.

title: Impact of the NaClO 4 /NaPF 6 salt ratio on the structure, mechanical and conductive properties of the PEO:(NaClO 4 ) 1− x (NaPF 6 ) x solid polymer electrolyte
abstract: The NaClO 4 /NaPF 6 combination improves the mechanical properties of SPE films without loss of conductivity. The composition PEO 12.5 :(NaClO 4 ) 0.5 (NaPF 6 ) 0.5 has conductivity similar to that of PEO 12.5 :NaClO 4 , but the E value is 10 times higher.

title: Towards the valorization of poly(acrylic acid) waste: organophotoredox-catalyzed decarboxylative fluorination
authors: 'Pankti Shabd Mehta', 'Max B. Levy', 'Robert M. O'Dea', 'Thomas H. Epps', 'Mary P. Watson'
abstract: Use of riboflavin as a sustainable and economical organophotocatalyst enables the photoredox-catalyzed decarboxylative functionalization of a superabsorbent polymer component, poly(acrylic acid) (PAA), to copolymers of PAA and poly(vinyl fluoride).

title: Synthesis of α,ω-end hetero-functionalized polyisoprene via neodymium-mediated coordinative chain transfer polymerization
abstract: A novel approach utilizing neodymium-catalyzed coordinative chain transfer polymerization (CCTP) to construct end-functionalized polyisoprenes with distinct and regulatable functional groups at the α- and ω-termini is presented.

title: Circularly polarized polymeric light-emitting diodes: preparation and properties
abstract: This review summarizes recent progress on CP-PLEDs, in which the different types of polymer-based emitting materials are introduced in detail.

title: Design of degradable, intrinsically flame-retardant and high-performance tung-oil-based epoxy vitrimers
abstract: Using tung oil as raw material, DOPO and carboxylate bonds were introduced to obtain a chemically degradable epoxy resin with excellent performance.

title: Mechanoredox catalyzed cationic RAFT polymerization via perfluorinated anion assistance for the synthesis of high-molecular-weight polymers
abstract: This work developed a perfluorinated anion-assisted strategy to facilitate the mechanochemical cationic RAFT polymerization of vinyl ethers. This approach enabled the preparation of high-molecular-weight poly(vinyl ether)s.

title: Polymeric toroidal assemblies formed from ionic homopolymers with shackling photo-responsive behavior
abstract: Morphologically pure polymeric toroids with uniform and tunable sizes are formed via a UV light-induced shackling isomerization of polyolefin-based homopolymers with pyridinium cation junctions between the main chain and azobenzene pendants.

title: Tunable polyethylene–polypropylene blends via compatibilization through nitrene insertion-enabled dynamic covalent crosslinking
abstract: Polymer blends offer a cost-effective way to create new materials with enhanced properties.

title: Recent progress in nonstoichiometric step-growth polymerization
abstract: This review examines recent progress in synthesizing high-molecular-weight polymers via atypical nonstoichiometric step-growth polymerization based on reactive intermediate mechanism or intramolecular catalyst transfer systems.

title: Photo-curable resins based on poly(globalide) for 3D printing of resorbable scaffolds: synthesis, crosslinking and post-functionalization
abstract: Resins based on poly(globalide) diacrylate for vat photo-polymerization of biocompatible and biodegradable materials.

title: A pinch of silver salt to enable rac -lactide ring-opening polymerisation at room temperature using Ti-salen complexes
abstract: Exploiting non-covalent interactions (NCIs) has become a powerful tool in catalyst design, including those for polymerisation reactions.

title: Effect of alkyl side chain length on microscopic structures and mechanical properties of ionically-functionalized block polymer-based thermoplastic elastomers
abstract: Ionically-functionalized block polymer-based thermoplastic elastomers with shorter alkyl chains formed larger microscopic ionic aggregates due to reduced steric hindrance, enhancing tensile strength and toughness compared to those with longer ones.

title: Special interplay of hydrogen bonds and dynamic covalent bonds in sustainable polyurethane vitrimers with excellent recyclability and reprocessability
abstract: Sustainable polyurethane vitrimers with excellent mechanical properties, recyclability and reprocessability were prepared, and the interplay between the dynamic imine bond network and hydrogen bond network is revealed.

title: Synthesis and depolymerization studies of biohybrid polycarbonates derived from terpenes
abstract: Biohybrid polycarbonates with a controlled degree of functionality can be prepared catalytically from (a)cyclic terpene oxides and CO 2 under practical conditions, and selectively depolymerized affording the original oxirane monomers.

title: Acid-cleavable poly(oxazoline) surfactants
abstract: A hydrazone-linked poly(oxazoline) diblock copolymer is reported, enabling pH-sensitive nanoparticles. Hydrazone cleavage and payload release profiles demonstrate its viability for controlled drug delivery in cancer-relevant conditions.

title: “Grafting-from” synthesis of polyvinyl ether bottlebrush polymers via a combination of cationic polymerization and ATRP
abstract: A method for preparing bottlebrush polymers with a polyvinyl ether backbone has been successfully developed by using a combination of organic Brønsted acid-catalysed cationic polymerization and copper-catalysed atom transfer radical polymerization.

title: Selective copolymerization of CS 2 and oxetane to synthesize poly(ether–thioether–carbonate)
abstract: Organocatalytic synthesis of poly(ether–thioether–carbonate) from CS 2 and oxetane provides tunable ether/thioether/carbonate linkages via regulated oxygen/sulfur exchange reaction for functional rubber precursors.

title: Optimisation of azide–alkyne click reactions of polyacrylates using online monitoring and flow chemistry
abstract: Herein, the online and inline 1 H-NMR monitoring of azide–alkyne click reactions of polymers is investigated.

title: Zwitterionic polymerization of glycolide catalyzed by pyridine
abstract: Pyridine is shown to be an effective catalyst for the snthesis of low molar mass cyclic polyglcolides via zwittzerionic polymerization. The cyclic polyglycolides form extended-ring crystals in the mass range below m / z 3000.

title: Yttrium-mediated ring-opening polymerization of functionalizable dihydrocarvide: tunable terpene-based polyesters using grafting from and block copolymerization strategies
abstract: Poly((−)-dihydrocarvide) is synthesized via yttrium-mediated ring-opening polymerization. Block copolymerization and functionalization yield semi-crystalline and brush polymers, highlighting its versatility in copolymer design.

title: Photoactive methylene blue-functionalized polymer for antimicrobial activation under red light
abstract: Towards targeted and safe photoinduced bacterial elimination through skin barriers using a newly developed, biocompatible dye-embedded polymer micelle.

title: Efficiently healable, recyclable, and dynamically assembled high-filled energetic composites using an insulin-inspired triple dynamic network
abstract: This study proposed an insulin-inspired triple dynamic bond strategy. The collaborative use of van der Waals forces, H-bonds, and disulfide bonds achieved the effective crack-healing, recycling, and assembling in the highly filled composites.

title: Frontal polymerization of thiol–acrylate covalent adaptable networks
abstract: Herein, energy-efficient curing is combined with the versatility of dynamic polymer networks. The resulting materials show fast stress relaxation via transesterification reactions and can be reprocessed and reshaped at elevated temperatures.

title: Sonochemistry-assisted reversible addition–fragmentation chain transfer polymerization for synthesizing multicolor room-temperature phosphorescent polymers
abstract: Sonochemistry-assisted reversible addition–fragmentation chain transfer polymerization was successfully performed to synthesize well-defined gradient copolymers with multicolor room-temperature phosphorescence.

title: Supramolecular method enabling effective through-space charge transfer in thermally activated delayed fluorescence materials with pure orange emission
abstract: A supramolecular strategy has been developed to enhance through-space charge transfer by precisely regulating the spatial arrangement of donor–acceptor pairs, resulting in thermally activated delayed fluorescence with pure orange emission.

title: Octahydrofluorenyl rare-earth metal-catalyzed simultaneous chain-growth and step-growth polymerization of para -methoxystyrene
abstract: The simultaneous chain-growth and step-growth polymerization of p -methoxystyrene was achieved using rare-earth metal complexes (Sc, Y, Gd to Lu) based on an octahydrofluorenyl ligand.

title: Crosslinking of polymers from monofunctional acrylates via C–H bond activation
abstract: Monofunctional acrylates can form cross-linked networks via hydrogen atom transfer between monomer substituents and radicals, offering a strategy for designing durable acrylic polymers without multifunctional crosslinkers or post-treatments.

title: Developing environmentally friendly fishing nets by integrating halogenated marine terpene with hydrogel polymers
abstract: This study developed environmentally friendly fishing nets using a halogenated marine terpene and hydrogel polymers.

title: Direct chromophore integration into polymer backbones via rhodanine step-growth chemistry
abstract: The precise spatiotemporal control of light-gated reactions makes photodegradable polymers highly attractive for designing materials that disintegrate on demand.

title: An efficient “depolymerization–polymerization” closed-loop recycling strategy for selective degradation of polycaprolactone
abstract: The “depolymerization–polymerization” closed-loop recycling strategy offers a more sustainable, resource-efficient, and environmentally friendly approach for waste polymers.

title: Two-stepping: sol–gel–gel transitions in a mixed thermoresponsive polymer system
abstract: Mixed systems of poloxamer 407 and a poly( N -isopropylacrylamide)-based triblock copolymer exhibit an unconventional sol–gel–gel transition on heating.

title: Tunable circularly polarized luminescence of D–A type chiral conjugated oligomers via achiral donors
abstract: D–A type chiral conjugated oligomers are developed by the copolymerization of axially chiral acceptors and achiral donors, which exhibit tunable circularly polarized luminescence via the variation of achiral donors.

title: Functionalized cyclic olefin copolymers: chemoselective polymerization of a cyclopropane-containing norbornadiene dimer using a titanium catalyst and post-polymerization modification
abstract: This work demonstrates the synthesis of functionalized polyolefins via titanium catalysis and post-polymerization modification. The key to success is the lack of coordination of the cyclopropane moiety to the propagating titanium species.

title: Divergent photoiniferter polymerization-induced self-assembly
abstract: Wavelength-dependent photoreactions present an opportunity to achieve chemoselectivity of functional groups that otherwise demonstrate similar reactivity under traditional thermal conditions.

title: Amphiphilic block-random copolymer stabilisers: extension to other monomer types
abstract: New generation of block-random copolymers (BRCs) can stabilize a wide range of monomers in emulsion polymerization.

title: Effect of macromonomer chemical structure on the rate of grafting-through ring-opening metathesis polymerization
abstract: We present unexpected observations where the rate of ring-opening metathesis polymerization (ROMP) is affected by the macromonomer polymer chain rather than the anchor group. We also observe that faster ROMP rate does not ensure better “livingness”.

title: BH 3 ·SMe 2 addition enables molar mass control via chain stabilization in phosphine–borane dehydropolymerization
abstract: BH 3 ·SMe 2 enables control over the molecular weight of [PhPH–BH 2 ] n , resulting in high molecular weight, low dispersity polyphosphinoboranes. A new mechanism is proposed, highlighting the role of Lewis acid–base equilibria in regulating chain growth.

title: l -Phenylalanine monomer coacervation leads to well-controlled nanocrystal topochemical photo-RAFT polymerization
abstract: Spontaneous LLPS-mode monomer self-coacervation is explored as a robust platform of the solid-state topochemical polymerization with unprecedentedly high molecular weight controllability.

title: Sulfur-containing block polymers from ring-opening copolymerization: coordinative encapsulants for transition metals
abstract: Sulfur-containing block copolymers were synthesized via ring-opening copolymerization, forming self-assembled aggregates with sulfur-rich cores that enable tunable metal coordination.

title: Synthesis of poly(3-keto- d -glucal) via conjugate addition polymerization
abstract: Glycal-based monomers were synthesized and then used for conjugate addition polymerization to afford high molecular weight polymers. Subsequently, the polymers were subjected to mild deprotection conditions to afford water-soluble macromolecules.

title: Synthesis and solution self-assembly of poly(benzotriazole)- b -poly(alkyl methacrylate)s
abstract: Synthesis and solution self-assembly of rod-coil block copolymers with electron-deficient conjugated rod blocks leads to observation of an assortment of morphologies, including lamella, nanowires, and toroids.

title: 5-Ethylidene-2-norbornene (ENB) and 5-vinyl-2-norbornene (VNB) based alicyclic polyols for the synthesis of polyesters
abstract: A dual catalytic strategy converts cycloaliphatic dienes into high T g polyesters, offering an innovative route to advanced polymer materials.

title: Functional fluoropolymers with good low-dielectric properties and high thermostability
abstract: Two fluoromonomers containing benzocyclobutene and fluorobenzene groups were synthesized from an effective method. The monomers were thermally converted to low-dielectric fluoropolymers with high thermostability and good hydrophobicity.

title: Ambient condition and oxygen-tolerant photopolymerization from near-UV to blue light via naphthimide–borate synergy
abstract: This study proposes a synergistic oxygen-resistant photoinitiation system based on naphthimide-borate, which enhances photolysis rates and oxygen resistance, enabling efficient curing of acrylic esters in air.

title: Effect of biphenyl groups on the properties of poly(fluorenylidene piperidinium) based anion exchange membranes for applications in water electrolyzers
abstract: A series of quaternized poly(arylene fluorenylidene piperidinium)-based copolymers were synthesized and the effect of biphenylene groups on the thin membrane properties was investigated for the application in alkaline water electrolyzers.

title: A defective polymer carbon nitride with expanding π-electron domains for efficient photocatalytic H 2 evolution
abstract: A polymeric carbon nitride with π-electron rich domains (benzene rings) and nitrogen vacancies was successfully synthesized, and it exhibited an excellent photocatalytic hydrogen evolution rate.

title: Synthesis of poly(3,4-propylenedioxythiophene) (PProDOT) analogues via mechanochemical oxidative polymerization
abstract: PProDOT analogues are synthesized without solvents and at room temperature with comparative yields/ M n to solvent-based protocols.

title: Influence of counterions on the thermal and solution properties of strong polyelectrolytes
abstract: Straightforward polymerisation and nucleophilic deprotection enable the production of a plurality of strong polyelectrolytes with various counterions, the nature of which strongly influences the thermal and solution properties of the macromolecules.

title: Preparation of highly thermally stable and soluble ethylene-crosslinked ladder-like polymethylsiloxanes via template polymerisation
abstract: Soluble ethylene-crosslinked ladder-like polymethylsiloxanes were prepared via template polymerisation. These polymers exhibited significantly high thermal stability, and their cast films demonstrated high transparency.

title: Polymethylene with cage silsesquioxane: densely grafted structure prevents side-chain crystallization
abstract: A polymethylene with cage silsesquioxane in the side chain was synthesized to suppress crystallization via a densely tethered structure. Unlike its polyacrylate counterpart, which formed a turbid film, this polymer gave a clear, uniform film.

title: Room-temperature magnetism in the crystal of a 1,6-heptadiyne derivative and its processable polymer
abstract: The black powder of a poly[1,6-heptadiyne] derivative demonstrates room-temperature ferromagnetism, a rare attribute in conjugated polymers.

title: Dual-responsive amphiphilic cysteine block copolypeptide: self-assembled vesicles for dye encapsulation and photo-triggered release
abstract: This work describes the synthesis of a dual-responsive amphiphilic block copolypeptide exhibiting both thermo- and photo-responsiveness in water. Encapsulated dye in self-assembled copolypeptide vesicles can be released by photoirradiation.

title: Introduction to polymers for gene delivery
abstract: Sébastian Perrier, Youqing Shen, Zhuxian Zhou, Todd Emrick and Marxa L. Figueiredo introduce the Polymer Chemistry themed issue on polymers for gene delivery.

title: Dual silicon side chain modification of one-component polysulfide adhesives for excellent mechanical properties and solvent resistance
abstract: The CO groups in BSU provide more active sites solving the problem of some reduction in initial mechanical properties. Meanwhile, the dual silicon side chains increase the silicon content improving solvent resistance and interfacial interaction.

title: Control over Ba( ii )-mediated single-chain polymer nanoparticle compaction by dynamic metal complexation
authors: 'Sebastian Gillhuber', 'Jochen A. Kammerer', 'Ada Quinn', 'Joshua O. Holloway', 'Kai Mundsinger', 'Evelina Liarou', 'Dmitri Golberg', 'Hendrik Frisch', 'Megan L. O'Mara', 'Christopher Barner-Kowollik', 'Peter W. Roesky'
abstract: The dynamic interactions of barium ions with a synthetic polymer are examined. These interactions result in the formation of intramolecularly folded single-chain nanoparticles (SCNPs), offering targeted control over the polymer morphology.

title: Programming cascade mesophase transitions of enzyme-responsive formulations via molecular engineering of dendritic amphiphiles
abstract: Tuning molecular structure and hydrophobicity enables co-assembled di- and tri-block amphiphiles to undergo cascade mesophase transitions with controlled timing—advancing the design of programmable enzyme-responsive materials with complex behavior.

title: Preparation of a biomass-derived imine hardener, biobased epoxy thermoset and their coating on cellulose nanofiber film for high-performance and energy-harvesting applications
abstract: The design of biobased epoxy-cellulose nanofiber (CNF) films is highly sought after in the scientific community and industry sector due to superior comprehensive properties.

title: Design and synthesis of thermoresponsive degradable copolymers: integrating hydroxy-functional vinyl ethers with cyclic ketene acetals
abstract: Degradable copolymers with tunable thermoresponsive properties are synthesized via radical copolymerization of hydroxy-functional vinyl ethers and 2-methylene-1,3-dioxepane, exhibiting LCST behavior in water and selective degradability.

title: Elemental sulfur utilization: construction of a reprocessable covalent crosslinked polydisulfide with enhanced mechanical properties
abstract: Synthesis of reprocessable covalent crosslinked polydisulfides with enhanced mechanical properties from elemental sulfur and episulfides.

title: Extending the π-conjugation of a hole transport polymer to enhance the efficiency of perovskite solar cells
abstract: By extending the π-conjugation, PBBT-DT exhibits superior hole transport properties, and the corresponding PVSC shows a champion PCE of 19.12%.

title: A facile route for the chemical functionalisation of polydivinylbenzenes and the application of amphoteric polydivinylbenzene microspheres to the simultaneous solid-phase extraction of acidic and basic drugs from water samples
abstract: Diels–Alder cycloadditions between polydivinylbenzenes and maleic anhydride followed by ring-opening with diamines yields amphoteric polymers with WAX and WCX character.

title: The carbonate exchange reaction strategy for chemical recycling of poly(bisphenol A carbonate) into an epoxy-curing agent
abstract: The carbonate exchange strategy was explored for the chemical recycling of BPA-PC to DPC-PC, which can serve as a curing agent for preparing high-performance and recyclable epoxy thermosets.

title: Enhanced lithographic performance of polymer-bound PAG photoresists synthesized via RAFT polymerization
abstract: The synthesis of PAG bound polymer photoresist resin via RAFT polymerization can effectively resolve many issues associated with the blending of PAG and resin.

title: Endowing phenolic formaldehyde resin with sustainability: why and how?
abstract: This review summarizes various strategies to make phenolic formaldehyde resin sustainable, including process improvements, substituting with green raw resources, establishing dynamic covalent bonds, and recycling into various functional materials.

title: Biobased multifunctional ingredients for manufacturing tire treads with high mechanical strength and fuel-saving efficiency
abstract: Sustainable plant oil/sulfur copolymers act as reactive modifier and plasticizer, delivering tire tread composites with lower rolling resistance, better wet traction, and enhanced recyclability.

title: Development of redox-active polycaprolactone and its electrochemical redox behavior in aqueous media
abstract: Redox-active polymers have garnered significant attention for their potential in organic radical batteries (ORB) due to their unique redox capabilities.

title: Poly(butylene succinate) filaments for fused deposition modelling (FDM) 3D-printing
abstract: We adopted an in situ branch modification strategy to improve the melt processing of PBS. The filament that meets the needs of FDM 3D printing has been successfully prepared, and a single PBS material was used to achieve a 3D printing product.

title: Advanced mechanical properties of amphiphilic polymer conetworks through hierarchical reinforcement with peptides and cellulose nanocrystals
abstract: Amphiphilic polymer conetworks were mechanically reinforced with a combination of peptide blocks and cellulose nanocrystals, resulting in transparent, water-swellable and hexane-swellable gels with excellent mechanical properties.

title: Highly isotactic polylactide by binary organocatalyzed polymerization of 1,3-dioxolan-4-ones
abstract: Ring-opening polymerization (ROP) of dioxolanones (DOXs) provides access to functional polyesters with properties that are challenging to achieve via traditional polymerization of lactones.

title: Thenoyl-functionalized polythiophenes with deep HOMO levels as polymer donors for organic solar cells
abstract: The electron-withdrawing property and steric hindrance of the thenoyl side chains endow polythiophene donors with deep HOMO energy levels and stretchable properties, and P4T-TCl with the terthiophene spacer shows the best photovoltaic performance.

title: Molecular weight regulates reversible adhesion of azopolymers with photoswitchable glass transition temperatures
abstract: Molecular weight regulates reversible adhesion in azopolymers: low-molecular-weight azopolymers function as UV-weakened adhesives, while high-molecular-weight azopolymers display UV-enhanced adhesion.

title: CO 2 -binding alcohols as potential candidates for poly(vinyl chloride) upcycling
abstract: CO 2 -binding alcohols enable selective PVC functionalization, integrating CO 2 into polymer modification while minimizing waste and unwanted side reactions.

title: The renewable feedstock levoglucosenone as a building block for the development of bio-derived, functional acrylic polymers
abstract: Acrylic polymers based on levoglucosenone (LGO) derived from cellulose pyrolysis are reported. These polymers possess a high glass transition temperature and functional pendant group for simple post-polymerization modification.

title: Preparation of a new class of phosphonated hydrocarbon polymers based on polysulfone
abstract: Pentafluorophenyl phosphonic acid group-containing PSU derivatives synthesized via a simple one-pot approach represent promising materials for (high-temperature) PEM fuel cells, (high-temperature) PEM water electrolysis, or redox flow batteries.

title: Reviving recovered carbon black as a reinforcement for natural rubber by utilizing acylhydrazine-functionalized polysulfide as an intelligent interfacial modifier
abstract: Acylhydrazine-functionalized polysulfide was facilely synthesized to couple natural rubber and recovered carbon black to improve mechanical performance and reduce hysteresis loss of the composites for high-grade utilization of recovered carbon black.

title: Rapid and versatile polymer–polymer coupling via iodide–thiol substitution click chemistry
abstract: A rapid and efficient coupling of iodide-terminated poly(butyl acrylate) (PBA-I) chains using a dithiol linker (HS-R-SH) to generate a coupling product (polymer-R-polymer) was developed.

title: A photocrosslinked hybrid hydrogel based on chitosan/hyaluronic acid/ZnO toward wound sealing
abstract: A newly designed photocrosslinked hydrogel, meticulously crafted through the integration of photoinitiated radical polymerization and photo-coupling reaction, exhibits rapid in situ gelation, high modulus and potent antibacterial activity.

title: Prompt2Poly: ask, specify, create – a dialogue-based large language model for targeted TSMPs design
abstract: Prompt2Poly, a natural language-driven framework, generates thermoset shape memory polymers in response to user prompts by specifying or clarifying target properties through iterative reasoning.

title: Dynamic by design: unlocking full relaxation in disulfide epoxy networks
abstract: Disulfide-based epoxy vitrimers enable full relaxation without excess amine. Introducing up to 32% non-dynamic epoxy enhances material properties while maintaining dynamic features like repairability, recyclability, and reprocessability.

title: Supramolecular multicolor fluorescent hydrogels with a single fluorescent group based on host–guest interactions
abstract: A new type of supramolecular multicolor fluorescent polymeric hydrogel was successfully constructed through pillararene-based host–guest interactions.

title: Structural dependence of the solution behavior of HPMA-based polymers
abstract: Water-soluble polymers are extensively studied materials in the field of biomedical chemistry research.

title: Thermoresponsive hydrogels incorporating phase-change energy storage materials for advanced thermal management
abstract: This review summarizes the latest advancements in phase-change hydrogels, covering synthesis, thermal responsiveness regulation, and applications.

title: Supramolecular bottlebrush copolymers from crown-ether functionalized poly( p -phenylenevinylene)s
abstract: Crown-ether functionalized poly( p -phenylenevinylene) (red) and cationic dibenzyl amine chain-end functionalized poly(styrene) (blue) were synthesized and assembled into optically active, pH responsive, and semi-crystalline bottlebrush copolymers.

title: Upcycling polyethersulfones to luminescent materials by aminolysis
abstract: The upcycling of polyethersulfone ( PES ), a high-performance polymer based on aromatic aryl-ether backbone, can yield both the starting comonomer bisphenol S and valuable OLED derivatives, providing a complete atom valorization strategy for PES waste.

title: Self-assembly of core-shell magnetic bottlebrush poly(ionic liquid)s: morphologies vs. magnetic properties
abstract: Core-shell magnetic bottlebrush polymers self-assembles into nanorods and nanospheres in aqueous and organic solution, respectively. The ferromagnetism is enhanced by nanorods due to the confinement of magnetic side chains.

title: 3D-printed microfluidic dialysis apparatus for efficient polymer purification
abstract: Optimization of flow polymer purification based on 3D-printed dialysis modules is described.

title: Unravelling the effect of side chain on RAFT depolymerization; identifying the rate determining step
abstract: The depolymerization rate of RAFT-synthesized methacrylates depends on the final monomer unit, with longer pendant chains enabling faster depolymerization due to enhanced chain activation.

title: Outstanding Reviewers for Polymer Chemistry in 2024
abstract: We would like to take this opportunity to highlight the Outstanding Reviewers for Polymer Chemistry in 2024, as selected by the editorial team for their significant contribution to the journal.

title: Creation of polymersomes with changes in the membrane structure via disulfide crosslinking under reductive conditions for controlled gradual cargo release
abstract: The addition of glutathione facilitated successive disulfide exchange reactions in the polymersome, resulting in the crosslinking of the membrane. This decreased the membrane permeability, enabling the controlled gradual release of the loaded cargo.

title: A nonconjugated AIE polymer from enol-conjugated ACQ curcumin through nucleophilic substitution polymerization-induced emission towards enhanced photocatalytic hydrogen evolution
abstract: S N PIE of a natural extract (curcumin) is used to prepare an AIE polymer, which exhibits intriguing ACQ-to-AIE transformation and efficient photocatalytic activity with an optimal H 2 production rate of 3122.5 μmol g −1 h −1 under visible light.

title: Correction: Axial-phenyl-constrained bis(imino)acenaphthene-nickel precatalysts enhance ethylene polymerization
abstract: Correction for ‘Axial-phenyl-constrained bis(imino)acenaphthene-nickel precatalysts enhance ethylene polymerization’ by Quanchao Wang et al. , Polym. Chem. , 2024, https://doi.org/10.1039/d4py01110d.

title: Correction: Simple oxime functionalized fluorene polymers for organic solar cells
abstract: Correction for ‘Simple oxime functionalized fluorene polymers for organic solar cells’ by Abdullah Adewale Adeoba et al. , Polym. Chem. , 2024, 15 , 4474–4481.

title: Lipoic acid/ethyl lipoate as cleavable comonomers for synthesis of degradable polymer networks
abstract: α-Lipoic acid, and its ester ethyl lipoate, were copolymerised with n -butyl acrylate and a crosslinker to install labile disulfide bonds within the strands of the resulting polymer networks enabling their degradation, reformation and self-healing.

title: Chemical modification of poly(isosorbide carbonate)-based copolymers with boronic acids and the ammonolysis of the modified copolymers
abstract: Functionalization of bio-based polycarbonates by post-polymerization modification with boronic acids was demonstrated for tuning the thermal and physical properties of original polymers without losing the degradability by ammonolysis.

title: One-step preparation of anisotropic snowman-like poly(ionic liquid) microspheres via microwave-assisted dispersion polymerization
abstract: We reported a one-step microwave-assisted dispersion polymerization method to prepare snowman-like PIL microspheres whose morphology can be adjusted by the amounts of monomer, DVB, initiator, solvent and microwave radiation temperature and mode.

title: Novel hyperbranched polymers from transfer-dominated branching radical telomerisation (TBRT) of diacrylate taxogens
abstract: The first study of Transfer-dominated Branching Radical Telomerisation using diacrylate taxogens shows elevated temperatures are required to create soluble high molecular weight branched polymers with full vinyl group consumption.

title: Carbon dot driven near infrared light induced miniemulsion atom transfer radical polymerization
abstract: Efficient near infrared light (808 nm) induced miniemulsion atom transfer radical polymerization (ATRP) was developed, using phosphorus and nitrogen codoped carbon dots as the photocatalyst.

title: The side-arm-effect controlled stereodivergent polymerization of 1-butene
abstract: Tridentate titanium complexes with different side-arm donors were employed for the efficient (activity of up to 3.41 × 10 6 g mol −1 h −1 ) production of poly(1-butene) with multiple types of isotacticity (ranging from atactic to 91% mmmm ).

title: A click-reaction for precise combination drug delivery: a general pH-responsive degradable backboned polyprodrug strategy
abstract: A pervasive polyprodrug strategy based on an acylalkynyl–hydroxyl click reaction for a precise combination drug delivery system.

title: 1,3-Diether-2-methacrylates with glycerol skeletons: tunable resins for stereolithography 3D printing
abstract: The abundance of glycerol associated with biofuel production makes it an interesting substrate for a variety of new molecules. Partly generated with AI.

title: Ambient and metal-free C(sp 2 )–C(sp 3 ) cross-coupling polymerization of dichalcones and activated methylenes to prepare clusteroluminescent polyarylacrylonitriles
abstract: A metal-free C(sp 2 )–C(sp 3 ) bond cross-coupling polymerization of chalcone derivatives and activated methylenes was established under ambient conditions.

title: Self-crosslinking pyrimidine siloxanes with tunable mechanical and adhesive properties
abstract: This study provide an “end-group architecture” strategy to achieve high-strength polydimethylsiloxane (PDMS) elastomers.

title: Panoramic view of biobased BHMTHF-based polymers
abstract: BHMTHF, also known as THFDM, is a biobased monomer that is utilized in the synthesis of polyesters and polyurethanes with unique properties. This review highlights the synthesis and structure-property relationship of these interesting polymers.

title: Visible light-promoted nickel-NHC photocatalysts for free radical photopolymerization and 3D printing application
abstract: Two Ni( ii )-NHC complexes were investigated as novel photocatalysts for the free radical photopolymerization of TMPETA under LED@405 nm. They showed notable photoinitiation capabilities, with the optimal conditions successfully applied in 3D printing.

title: Unexpected increase in water solubility by the introduction of hydrophobic units into imidazolium-based polymeric ionic liquids with carboxylate counteranions
abstract: The introduction of hydrophobic units into polymeric ionic liquids unexpectedly resulted in an increase in water solubility.

title: Photoactive complex enabled photo-controlled RAFT polymerization with CF 3 radical
abstract: The example of photoactive complex enabled photo-controlled RAFT polymerization initiated by a CF 3 radical has been demonstrated using an N-heterocyclic nitrenium as the catalyst, and the commercially available CF 3 SO 2 Cl as the CF 3 radical source.

title: Precisely controlled yet dynamically exchanged micelles via the self-assembly of amphiphilic acrylate random copolymers in water
abstract: Herein, we investigated the self-assembly of amphiphilic acrylate random copolymers bearing hydrophilic poly(ethylene glycol) chains and hydrophobic dodecyl groups into micelles in water.

title: Mechanical bonds in polymer backbones: does more mean better?
abstract: Polymer networks with varying mechanical bond contents in the backbone were designed. The results reveal that increases in mechanical bond content correlate positively with enhanced mechanical properties.

title: Interpenetrating vitrimers based on dioxaborolane metathesis and imine-aldehyde exchange
abstract: We report a simple methodology to prepare interpenetrating vitrimers based on dioxaborolane metathesis and imine-aldehyde exchange. The interpenetrating vitrimers exhibit a combination of properties superior to those of the constituent vitrimers.

title: Synthesis of electron-deficient polymers based on sulfur-bridged dithienylboranes as a building block
abstract: New electron-deficient p–π* conjugated polymers with thiaborin-based building blocks showed extended conjugation through the boron p orbital, strong absorption in the visible to near-infrared region, and deep LUMO energy levels lower than −3.6 eV.

title: Correction: Towards the synthesis of polythiazolines: a post-polymerization approach
abstract: Correction for ‘Towards the synthesis of polythiazolines: a post-polymerization approach’ by Aikaterini Mathianaki et al. , Polym. Chem. , 2025, https://doi.org/10.1039/d4py00930d.

title: Design, synthesis and applications of thermosensitive linear poly(ether amide)s with unconventional cluster luminescence and tunable LCST
abstract: Thermosensitive linear poly(ether amide)s with cluster fluorescence and LCST tunability were prepared via t -BuP 2 -catalyzed oxa-Michael addition polymerization of N , N ′-methylene-bis(acrylamide) with diols containing different numbers of carbon atoms.

title: A thiol-functional amine synergist as a co-initiator for DLP 3D printing applications
abstract: This article describes a newly synthesized thiol-functional amine synergist and its application as a co-initiator in two-component initiating systems to initiate radical photopolymerization in 3D printing.

title: Ethylene and alkyl acrylate copolymers made-to-order using dynamic cation switching polymerization and evidence for improved polymer degradability with low polar group density
abstract: Customization of ethylene and alkyl acrylate copolymers yields materials with mechanical properties comparable to polyethylene but with enhanced oxidative degradability.

title: Self-stabilized precipitation polymerization of Fischer–Tropsch mixed olefins with maleic anhydride and vinyl acetate
abstract: Nano-to-micron particles from FT mixed olefins were prepared through a self-stabilized precipitation polymerization method.

title: Incorporating polar oxazolidinones into polycyclooctadiene via frontal ring-opening metathesis polymerization
abstract: Polycyclooctadiene-based thermosets with polar oxazolidinone repeat units were synthesized via frontal ring-opening metathesis polymerization. Small amounts of polar functionality suppressed crystallization and greatly impacted mechanical properties.

title: Plastic–rubber diblock copolymers obtained from copolymerization of dimethyl-1,3-butadiene and butadiene using rare-earth metal catalysts
abstract: Coordination polymerization of 2,3-dimethyl-1,3-butadiene (DMB) has been investigated by using rare-earth metal catalysts.

title: Emulsion polymerisation stabilised by block-random copolymers: ultra-small particles at low stabiliser levels
abstract: Block-random copolymer stabilisers enable synthesis of ultra-small PMMA particles at low stabiliser levels. Latexes with particle diameters varying from 30–200 nm were prepared using as little as 0.01 wt% relative to monomer.

title: Force-induced fluorescence response of functional two-photon micro-nanofabrication photosensitive materials based on dynamic C–N bonds
abstract: A high strength and toughness epoxy acrylate (EA) photosensitive resin polymer with force induced fluorescence response and two-photon printing based on dynamic C–N bond construction.

title: Adjusting the electroosmotic flow for CE separation of proteins by using poly(α- l -lysine)-based mixed polycationic/polyzwitterionic multilayer coatings
abstract: Using poly(α- l -lysine)-based polycationic/polyzwitterionic polymers as the outermost layer of a 5-layer SMIL capillary coating, the EOF for CE separation of proteins can be precisely controlled by adjusting the degree of functionalization.

title: Enhanced mechano-responsive luminescence in polyurethanes by supramolecular mechanophores based on synergy between quadruple H-bonding and π–π stacking
abstract: Mechanoresponsive luminescent (MRL) PUs based on supramolecular mechanophores dominated by quadruple H-bonding and π–π stacking achieved dual-channel MRL by I M / I E ratio and wavelength shift with high sensitivity and reversibility.

title: Investigation of exo - and endo -isomers of 5-norbornene-2,3-dicarboxylic anhydride in ethylene copolymerization
abstract: The CA- exo can be more efficiently copolymerized with ethylene than its endo -isomer and exhibit higher polymerization activities, higher incorporations and higher molecular weights using phosphine-sulfonate palladium catalysts.

title: Polymerization behaviour of biscarbenes derived by thermolysis of bisdiazo compounds
abstract: The collapse of bisdiazo compounds with different terminal groups to generate reactive biscarbene intermediates has provided evidence for homopolymerization, in a process which proceeds in the absence of catalysts and is tolerant of oxygen.

title: Monodisperse amphiphilic double-crystalline block oligomers composed of linear alkyl chains and poly(vinyl alcohol) segments prepared by aldol-group transfer polymerization and recycling size-exclusion chromatography separation
abstract: Monodisperse amphiphilic diblock oligomers of C16 alkyl chains and vinyl alcohol units were prepared by aldol-group transfer polymerization and recycling size-exclusion chromatography separation to form a double-crystalline lamellar structure.

title: Polymer composites informatics for flammability, thermal, mechanical and electrical property predictions
abstract: Polymer composite performance depends significantly on the polymer matrix, additives, processing conditions, and measurement setups.

title: Guanidinium-based ionic porous organic polymer as a propitious material for inordinate uptake of permanganate ions from water
abstract: Metal-based oxo anions are major contributors towards freshwater contamination.

title: Urea as a monomer: synthesis and characterization of semi-aromatic thermoplastic non-isocyanate polyureas
abstract: TBD-catalyzed melt polycondensation overcomes the challenge of incorporating aromatic diamines directly into non-isocyanate polyureas, achieving tunable mechanical properties spanning three orders of magnitude (3 MPa to 1.1 GPa).

title: Mixed-mode interpenetrating polymer networks from polymerizable eutectics
abstract: Interpenetrating polymer networks (IPNs) and semi-IPNs are prepared directly in a one-pot approach using a binary polymerizable eutectic, consisting of two monomers that can be polymerized orthogonally with no additional solvents.

title: Harnessing ene-type and stereochemistry to control reaction kinetics and network architecture in thiol–ene photopolymerizations using maleate and fumarate-derived monomers
abstract: Bioacid-derived trienes show differences in the relative kinetics of thiol-mediated step-growth and chain-growth processes.

title: Developments in polytellurophenes and tellurophene-containing polymers: from synthesis to applications
abstract: Tellurophene, a five-membered heterocycle of metalloid tellurium, has unique redox, and optoelectronic properties. When integrated as a homopolymer or copolymer, these polymers exhibit novel properties, tailorable towards various applications.

title: Hydrosilylation-derived silicon-containing hydrocarbon-based polymers exhibiting ultralow dielectric losses and high thermal stabilities
abstract: Hydrosilylation-derived polymers combining siloxane and hydrocarbon units exhibit ultralow dielectric losses and outstanding thermal stability up to 110 GHz, offering promising performance for next-generation high-frequency applications.

title: Cellulose nanocrystals as stabilizers for waterborne fluorescent non-isocyanate polyurethane latexes
abstract: This work pioneers CNC-stabilized waterborne non-isocyanate polyurethane latexes via Pickering emulsion polymerization, achieving surfactant-free, fluorescent and sustainable materials.

title: Effect of fluorine substitution on tetraphenylethene-benzothiadiazole based AIE-active copolymers
abstract: Fluorination of a polymer improves its inter-chain stacking and enhances the emission of nanoparticle aggregates.

title: Novel biobased poly(hexamethylene- co -diethylene glycol furandicarboxylate) copolyesters with improved mechanical properties and hydrolytic degradation rates
abstract: A series of novel biobased poly(hexamethylene- co -diethylene glycol furandicarboxylate) copolyesters with improved mechanical properties and hydrolytic degradation rates were successfully synthesized.

title: Poly(malic acid) copolymers as degradable rheology modifiers in aqueous formulations
abstract: Branched co-polyesters built from malic acid are synthesised and trialed as degradable polymeric rheology modifiers, characterizing their branching topology, viscoelastic properties and hydrolytic stability.

title: Construction of the donor–acceptor type conjugated porous polymer/g-C 3 N 4 S-scheme heterojunction for efficient photocatalytic hydrogen production
abstract: An organic S-scheme heterojunction is synthesized. The donor–acceptor type conjugated porous polymer/g-C 3 N 4 -15 S-scheme heterojunction exhibits satisfactory photocatalytic hydrogen production performance.

title: Towards degradable and functionalizable polymers: alternating ring-opening metathesis copolymerization of oxanorbornadiene dicarboxylate and 2,3-dihydrofuran
abstract: A degradable and functionalizable polymer, capable of post-polymerization modification, was developed through the alternating ring-opening metathesis copolymerization of commercially available oxanorbornadiene and 2,3-dihydrofuran.

title: Polymer-templated films of ordered mesoporous carbon: preparation, characterization and applications
abstract: A concise overview of soft-templated ordered mesoporous carbon films is provided, discussing the key morphology-specific aspects of their synthesis, characterization and applications.

title: Ring-opening polymerization of a tri-substituted six-membered lactone derived from CO 2 /butadiene
abstract: The first ring-opening polymerization of tri-substituted CO 2 /butadiene derived six-membered lactones, leading to linear/cyclic polymers selectively with chemical recyclability.

title: Preparation and properties of stretchable low temperature resistant flexible epoxy resin curing agent
abstract: EP/NBO 10 demonstrated excellent low-temperature tensile strength after being immersed in liquid nitrogen (77 K) for 24 hours and maintained circuit stability after being immersed in liquid nitrogen for 30 days.

title: Photobase-catalyzed thiol–ene click chemistry for light-based additive manufacturing
abstract: Ionic liquids solvate photobase generators to facilitate vat photopolymerization of thiol–ene ionogels. The base-catalyzed ionogels were more ductile than radical-mediated ionogels.

title: Ion mobility mass spectrometry coupled with molecular dynamics simulations: in-depth structural analysis of polystyrene-based Au-containing copolymers
abstract: Ionization- and desolvation-induced folding of complex copolymers as precursors to single-chain nanoparticles, upon electrospray ionization: a combined ion mobility-mass spectrometry/molecular dynamics synergistic approach.

title: Chain folding of carbazole-donor containing polymers via a two-point interaction with naphthalene monoimide-based acceptors
abstract: Linear polymers carrying electron-rich carbazole donors linked by flexible oligooxyethylene segments formed a pleated conformation by interacting with an electron-deficient dinitro-naphthalene monoimide acceptor carrying an ammonium perchlorate unit.

title: Implementing a sulfur-substitution approach toward a high-performance recyclable polythioester
abstract: By implementing a sulfur-substitution approach, the resulting polythioester P(tCL) exhibited excellent chemical recyclability and high-performance properties such as high crystallinity, excellent gas barrier, and polyolefin-like mechanical property.

title: AIE polymers for biosensing applications
abstract: This review focuses on introducing the progress of AIE-active polymers in biosensing applications, including detection of ions in the physiological environment, bio-related molecules detection, in vitro and in vivo bioimaging.

title: A redox-responsive AIE-active supramolecular polymer constructed by noncovalent and dynamic covalent bonds
abstract: A redox-responsive AIE-active supramolecular polymer was constructed by noncovalent and dynamic covalent bonds.

title: One-pot route to aryl halide/sulfur/olefin terpolymers via sequential crosslinking by radical-initiated aryl halide-sulfur polymerization, inverse vulcanization, and sulfenyl chloride formation
abstract: Sequential crosslinking steps convert industrial waste sulfur into versatile high-sulfur content materials (HSMs), each with distinct properties, providing a tunable platform for advanced material development.

title: Unveiling the zwitterionic nature of an ethyl piperazine-based dithiocarbamate chain transfer agent for achieving high molar mass polyvinyl acetate: experimental and computational insights
abstract: A more stable zwitterionic form, rather than an active CS state, makes dithiocarbamate based CTA-1 a less active system. The low addition rates of CTA-1 enhance its compatibility with the polymerization of the VAc monomer.

title: An ultrafast thermal-responsive, shape memory and solvent-driven Fe 3+ -alginate/poly( N -isopropyl acrylamide)-based hydrogel actuator
abstract: A Fe 3+ -sodium alginate/poly( N -isopropyl acrylamide) IPN hydrogel with ultrafast thermal response, shape memory function and solvent-driven behavior was prepared via a simple and convenient method of chemical and physical double crosslinking.

title: Scalable access to functional nylon 6 via ring-opening copolymerization of biobased δ-valerolactam with ε-caprolactam
abstract: Both monomer and copolymer synthesis proved scalable. Polymers’ properties were excellent and they could react with electrophiles to produce diverse functional materials.

title: Structure and dynamics in poly(ethylene oxide)-blended single-ion conducting polymer electrolytes based on side-chain ionomers
abstract: Thermal properties, morphology, and ion transport properties of single-ion conducting polymer electrolyte blends based on a side-chain ionomer are investigated.

title: Thermally stable vanadium( v ) complexes bearing bidentate phenoxy-phosphine ligands: synthesis, characterization, and catalytic properties for alkene polymerization
abstract: Vanadium catalysts with bidentate phenoxy-phosphine ligands exhibited high performance in olefin (co)polymerization. Subtle variations significantly modulated this performance, emphasizing the importance of precise ligand and comonomer selection.

title: Ultra-low-molecular-weight PE wax using a cyclohexyl-fused bis(imino)pyridine-cobalt catalyst functionalized with a remote para -phenyl group
abstract: The bis(cyclohexyl)-fused bis(imino)pyridine-cobalt complex precatalysts exhibited extremely high catalytic activity toward ethylene polymerization producing ultra-low molecular weight and linear polyethylenes with narrow dispersity.

title: Alkyl-substituted trithiocarbonates enable performing open-to-air RAFT polymerization regardless of the presence or absence of an R-group
abstract: Herein, with the assistance of high-throughput (HTP) screening, we found alkyl-substituted trithiocarbonates possess the ability to perform fully oxygen-tolerant RAFT polymerization regardless of the presence or absence of an R-group.

title: Directed dihydroxylation of a poly(cyclooctadienol) toward densely-hydroxylated polyol adhesives
abstract: Directed dihydroxylation of an unsaturated polymer yields polyols with a dense array of alcohol groups toward applications in adhesives.

title: Multifunctional dithiolane monomers for multi-scale, recyclable light-driven additive manufacturing
abstract: Multifunctional dithiolane monomers were prepared, polymerized, printed across multiple length scales, and recycled.

title: Synthesis and applications of conjugated main-chain charged polyelectrolytes
abstract: The synthetic methods and applications of conjugated main-chain charged polyelectrolytes (CMCPs) with different cationic structures are summarized in this review to facilitate the development of more diversified CMCPs with advanced functionalities.

title: Synthesis strategy and application of multifunctional antifreeze hydrogels
abstract: This figure illustrates the comprehensive anti-freezing mechanisms of the hydrogel. These materials demonstrate high strength, conductivity, adhesion, self-healing capability, and biocompatibility, making them suitable for diverse applications.
